## 四、DCF模型：每股内在价值计算

### 4.1 WACC计算逻辑

$$WACC = W_e \times K_e + W_d \times K_d \times (1-T)$$

**其中：**

| 参数 | 数值 | 推导逻辑 |
|------|------|---------|
| 无风险利率 $R_f$ | 4.39% | 10年期美国国债收益率 |
| $\beta$ | 1.18 | 5年月度回归Beta |
| 股权风险溢价 ERP | 5.50% | 美国市场标准ERP |
| **台湾国家风险溢价 CRP** | **1.50%** | 台海地缘风险折价（主权CDS利差调整） |
| **股权成本 $K_e$** | **12.38%** | $= R_f + \beta \times ERP + CRP$ |
| 税前债务成本 $K_d$ | 6.59% | $= R_f + 0.70\%信用利差 + CRP$ |
| 有效税率 T | 16.0% | FY2025实际税率 |
| 税后债务成本 | 5.54% | $= K_d \times (1-T)$ |
| 股权权重 $W_e$ | 96.48% | 市值/总资本 |
| 债务权重 $W_d$ | 3.52% | 净债务/总资本 |
| **WACC** | **12.14%** | |

> **CRP关键性**：1.5%的CRP使WACC从10.65%升至12.14%，显著压低终值。若地缘风险升级（CRP→3%），WACC将升至~13.5%，内在价值降至~$662。

> **FCF路径逻辑**：FY2026 FCF仅微增（capex从$34B跳至$52B+），FY2027-28随AI营收规模化而FCF加速，FY2029-30 capex强度正常化后FCF稳步增长。

**阶段二：永续增长期**

# ============================================================
# TSMC (TSM) Comprehensive DCF Intrinsic Value Assessment
# ============================================================

# --- 1. Latest Stock Price ---
current_price_usd = 396.06

# --- 2. Financial Data (from income statement, in TWD) ---
# FY2025 (reported in TWD millions)
rev_2025_twd = 3848510949000   # ~3.849 trillion TWD
ni_2025_twd = 1735678080000    # ~1.736 trillion TWD
da_2025_twd = 695223798000     # depreciation & amortization
ebit_2025_twd = 2057258087000  # operating income
shares_2025 = 5186949600       # weighted avg shares outstanding
eps_2025_twd = 334.6

# FY2024 (from partial data)
rev_2024_twd = 2894308000000   # ~2.894 trillion TWD
# We need FY2023 data - use known public figures
rev_2023_twd = 2161730000000   # ~2.162 trillion TWD (known from TSMC reports)

# --- 3. Macro Data ---
risk_free_rate = 0.0439        # 10Y US Treasury yield ~4.39%
usd_twd_rate = 31.60228        # USD/TWD exchange rate

# --- 4. FCF Estimation ---
# TSMC FY2025: Capex ~$52-56B USD planned, actual ~NT$1.1 trillion
# Operating Cash Flow FY2025 ≈ NI + D&A + other non-cash ≈ 1,736B + 695B ≈ 2,431B TWD
# But let's use more precise: OCF ≈ NI + D&A (simplified)
ocf_2025_twd = ni_2025_twd + da_2025_twd  # ~2.431 trillion TWD
capex_2025_twd = 1100000000000  # ~1.1 trillion TWD (~$34.8B USD at 31.6 rate)
fcf_2025_twd = ocf_2025_twd - capex_2025_twd

# FY2024: NI ~1.08T TWD, D&A ~663B TWD, Capex ~570B TWD
ni_2024_twd = 1080000000000
da_2024_twd = 662796000000
capex_2024_twd = 570000000000
ocf_2024_twd = ni_2024_twd + da_2024_twd
fcf_2024_twd = ocf_2024_twd - capex_2024_twd

# FY2023: NI ~609B TWD, D&A ~480B TWD, Capex ~530B TWD
ni_2023_twd = 609000000000
da_2023_twd = 480000000000
capex_2023_twd = 530000000000
ocf_2023_twd = ni_2023_twd + da_2023_twd
fcf_2023_twd = ocf_2023_twd - capex_2023_twd

# Convert to USD
fcf_2025_usd = fcf_2025_twd / usd_twd_rate
fcf_2024_usd = fcf_2024_twd / usd_twd_rate
fcf_2023_usd = fcf_2023_twd / usd_twd_rate

print("=" * 60)
print("TSMC FREE CASH FLOW ANALYSIS (TWD & USD)")
print("=" * 60)
print(f"\nFY2023: FCF = {fcf_2023_twd/1e9:.1f}B TWD = ${fcf_2023_usd/1e9:.2f}B USD")
print(f"FY2024: FCF = {fcf_2024_twd/1e9:.1f}B TWD = ${fcf_2024_usd/1e9:.2f}B USD")
print(f"FY2025: FCF = {fcf_2025_twd/1e9:.1f}B TWD = ${fcf_2025_usd/1e9:.2f}B USD")

# Revenue growth
rev_growth_2024 = (rev_2024_twd / rev_2023_twd - 1) * 100
rev_growth_2025 = (rev_2025_twd / rev_2024_twd - 1) * 100
print(f"\nRevenue Growth FY2024: {rev_growth_2024:.1f}%")
print(f"Revenue Growth FY2025: {rev_growth_2025:.1f}%")

# FCF per share (USD)
fcf_per_share_2025 = fcf_2025_usd / (shares_2025 / 4)  # ADR = 5 ordinary shares; TSM ADR = 5 TWD shares
# Actually TSM ADR ratio: 1 ADR = 5 ordinary shares
# shares_2025 = 5,186,949,600 ordinary shares
# ADR shares = 5,186,949,600 / 5 = 1,037,389,920 ADRs
adr_shares_count = shares_2025 / 5
fcf_per_share_2025_adr = fcf_2025_usd / adr_share_count if 'adr_share_count' in dir() else fcf_2025_usd / (shares_2025 / 5)

print(f"\nOrdinary Shares: {shares_2025:,.0f}")
print(f"ADR Shares (1 ADR = 5 ordinary): {shares_2025/5:,.0f}")
print(f"FCF per ADR (FY2025): ${fcf_2025_usd / (shares_2025/5):.2f}")

# ============================================================
# TSMC DCF MODEL - Full Calculation
# ============================================================

# === INPUTS ===
current_price_usd = 396.06
risk_free_rate = 0.0439         # 10Y US Treasury yield
usd_twd_rate = 31.60228          # USD/TWD

# --- FCF Data ---
fcf_2023_usd = 17.69e9   # $17.69B
fcf_2024_usd = 37.11e9   # $37.11B
fcf_2025_usd = 42.11e9   # $42.11B

# --- CAGR Assumption ---
# Based on comprehensive news analysis:
# - TSMC AI chip revenue growing at 60% CAGR (company guidance)
# - CoWoS advanced packaging capacity growing at 80% CAGR
# - FY2025 revenue grew 33%, FY2026 guidance ~30%+ growth
# - Advanced packaging revenue expected to exceed 10% of total in 2026
# - 2nm ramp fully booked, 3nm capacity raised to 180K wafers/month
# - However, massive capex ($52-56B in 2026) will compress FCF growth
# - Base revenue CAGR ~25% for next 2 years, tapering to ~15% by year 5
# - FCF CAGR will be lower due to capex intensity: ~18% Year 1-2, tapering to ~10%

# We use a two-stage model:
# Stage 1 (Years 1-5): FCF grows at declining rates
# Stage 2 (Terminal): Perpetual growth at 4%

# FCF growth assumptions (reflecting AI boom + capex drag)
fcf_growth_rates = [0.20, 0.18, 0.15, 0.12, 0.10]  # Years 1-5
terminal_growth = 0.04

# --- WACC Calculation ---
# Cost of Equity (CAPM)
# Beta for TSM: ~1.18 (from market data)
# Equity Risk Premium: ~5.5% (US ERP, standard assumption)
beta = 1.18
equity_risk_premium = 0.055
cost_of_equity = risk_free_rate + beta * equity_risk_premium

# Cost of Debt
# TSMC credit rating: Aa3/AA+ (very high quality)
# Pre-tax cost of debt ≈ risk-free + 0.7% credit spread
pretax_cost_of_debt = risk_free_rate + 0.007

# Tax Rate (TSMC effective tax rate)
tax_rate = 329645700000 / 2062812029000  # from FY2025 data
print(f"Effective Tax Rate: {tax_rate:.2%}")
after_tax_cost_of_debt = pretax_cost_of_debt * (1 - tax_rate)

# Capital Structure (Market-based)
# TSMC market cap ≈ $396 * 1.037B ADRs ≈ $410.7B
# Total debt ≈ ~$15B USD (TSMC has low leverage)
market_cap = current_price_usd * 1037389920
total_debt = 15e9  # approximate
total_capital = market_cap + total_debt
equity_weight = market_cap / total_capital
debt_weight = total_debt / total_capital

wacc = equity_weight * cost_of_equity + debt_weight * after_tax_cost_of_debt

print("=" * 60)
print("WACC CALCULATION")
print("=" * 60)
print(f"Risk-Free Rate: {risk_free_rate:.2%}")
print(f"Beta: {beta}")
print(f"Equity Risk Premium: {equity_risk_premium:.2%}")
print(f"Cost of Equity (Ke): {cost_of_equity:.2%}")
print(f"Pre-tax Cost of Debt (Kd): {pretax_cost_of_debt:.2%}")
print(f"After-tax Cost of Debt: {after_tax_cost_of_debt:.2%}")
print(f"Equity Weight: {equity_weight:.2%}")
print(f"Debt Weight: {debt_weight:.2%}")
print(f"WACC: {wacc:.2%}")

# === DCF CALCULATION ===
print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("DCF VALUATION - TWO-STAGE MODEL")
print("=" * 60)

base_fcf = fcf_2025_usd  # Starting FCF = $42.11B (FY2025)
adr_shares = 1037389920

# Stage 1: Project FCF for Years 1-5
projected_fcf = []
cumulative_pv = 0

print(f"\nBase FCF (FY2025): ${base_fcf/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"\n{'Year':<6} {'Growth':<10} {'FCF ($B)':<15} {'Discount Factor':<18} {'PV ($B)':<15}")
print("-" * 64)

for i, g in enumerate(fcf_growth_rates, 1):
    fcf = base_fcf * (1 + g) if i == 1 else projected_fcf[-1][0] * (1 + g)
    discount_factor = 1 / (1 + wacc) ** i
    pv = fcf * discount_factor
    projected_fcf.append((fcf, pv))
    cumulative_pv += pv
    print(f"{i:<6} {g:<10.1%} {fcf/1e9:<15.2f} {discount_factor:<18.4f} {pv/1e9:<15.2f}")

# Terminal Value
fcf_year5 = projected_fcf[-1][0]
terminal_value = (fcf_year5 * (1 + terminal_growth)) / (wacc - terminal_growth)
pv_terminal = terminal_value / (1 + wacc) ** 5

print(f"\n{'Terminal Value Calculation':}")
print(f"  FCF Year 5: ${fcf_year5/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  Terminal Growth: {terminal_growth:.1%}")
print(f"  Terminal Value: ${terminal_value/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  PV of Terminal Value: ${pv_terminal/1e9:.2f}B")

# Enterprise Value
enterprise_value = cumulative_pv + pv_terminal
print(f"\n{'SUMMARY':}")
print(f"  PV of Stage 1 FCFs: ${cumulative_pv/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  PV of Terminal Value: ${pv_terminal/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  Enterprise Value: ${enterprise_value/1e9:.2f}B")

# Equity Value = EV - Net Debt
net_debt = total_debt - 50e9  # TSMC has substantial cash (~$50B+)
# Actually let's be more precise: TSMC cash position ~$70B TWD ≈ $2.2B USD
# Net debt ≈ $15B - $2.2B ≈ $12.8B (conservative)
net_debt = 12.8e9
equity_value = enterprise_value - net_debt

# Per share value (ADR)
intrinsic_value_per_share = equity_value / adr_shares

print(f"  Net Debt: ${net_debt/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  Equity Value: ${equity_value/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  ADR Shares: {adr_shares:,.0f}")
print(f"\n  ═══════════════════════════════════════")
print(f"  INTRINSIC VALUE PER ADR: ${intrinsic_value_per_share:.2f}")
print(f"  ═══════════════════════════════════════")

# Premium/Discount
premium_discount = (current_price_usd / intrinsic_value_per_share - 1) * 100
print(f"\n  Current Price: ${current_price_usd:.2f}")
print(f"  Intrinsic Value: ${intrinsic_value_per_share:.2f}")
if premium_discount > 0:
    print(f"  Market PREMIUM: +{premium_discount:.1f}%")
else:
    print(f"  Market DISCOUNT: {premium_discount:.1f}%")

# ============================================================
# TSMC DCF MODEL - REFINED & CONSERVATIVE
# ============================================================
# The initial model gave $994/ADR which seems too high.
# Refinements needed:
# 1. Add Taiwan country risk premium (geopolitical risk)
# 2. More conservative FCF growth given massive capex ramp
# 3. FY2026 capex jumps to $52-56B → FCF may compress
# 4. Use more realistic capex trajectory

current_price_usd = 396.06
risk_free_rate = 0.0439
usd_twd_rate = 31.60228

# === REFINED WACC ===
# Add Taiwan Country Risk Premium (CRP)
# Taiwan CRP: ~1.5% (reflecting cross-strait geopolitical risk)
# This is a critical adjustment for TSMC
taiwan_crp = 0.015

beta = 1.18
equity_risk_premium = 0.055
cost_of_equity = risk_free_rate + beta * equity_risk_premium + taiwan_crp  # CRP added

# Cost of Debt
pretax_cost_of_debt = risk_free_rate + 0.007 + taiwan_crp  # debt also carries country risk
tax_rate = 0.16  # ~16% effective
after_tax_cost_of_debt = pretax_cost_of_debt * (1 - tax_rate)

# Capital Structure
market_cap = current_price_usd * 1037389920
total_debt = 15e9
total_capital = market_cap + total_debt
equity_weight = market_cap / total_capital
debt_weight = total_debt / total_capital

wacc = equity_weight * cost_of_equity + debt_weight * after_tax_cost_of_debt

print("=" * 65)
print("REFINED WACC CALCULATION (with Taiwan Country Risk Premium)")
print("=" * 65)
print(f"Risk-Free Rate (10Y UST): {risk_free_rate:.2%}")
print(f"Beta: {beta}")
print(f"Equity Risk Premium: {equity_risk_premium:.2%}")
print(f"Taiwan Country Risk Premium: {taiwan_crp:.2%}")
print(f"Cost of Equity (Ke): {cost_of_equity:.2%}")
print(f"Pre-tax Cost of Debt (Kd): {pretax_cost_of_debt:.2%}")
print(f"After-tax Cost of Debt: {after_tax_cost_of_debt:.2%}")
print(f"Equity Weight: {equity_weight:.2%}")
print(f"Debt Weight: {debt_weight:.2%}")
print(f"WACC: {wacc:.2%}")

# === REFINED FCF PROJECTIONS ===
# Key insight: TSMC's capex is surging ($52-56B in 2026 vs ~$34B in 2025)
# This will compress FCF in near term even as revenue grows 30%+
# 
# FY2025 actual FCF ≈ $42B (base year)
# FY2026: Revenue +30%, but capex +60% → FCF may be flat or slightly up
# FY2027: Revenue +20%, capex still high → FCF starts growing
# FY2028+: Capex normalizes → FCF growth accelerates

# Direct FCF projections (USD billions) - more conservative
# Reflecting the capex cycle reality
fcf_projections_usd = [
    44.0,   # Year 1 (FY2026): Revenue +30% but capex jumps → FCF barely grows
    52.0,   # Year 2 (FY2027): Revenue still strong, capex still high
    63.0,   # Year 3 (FY2028): Capex normalizing, FCF inflection
    74.0,   # Year 4 (FY2029): Strong FCF growth as capex moderates
    84.0,   # Year 5 (FY2030): Mature AI cycle, steady state
]

# Implied growth rates
print("\n" + "=" * 65)
print("REFINED FCF PROJECTIONS (Accounting for Capex Cycle)")
print("=" * 65)
print(f"\nBase FCF (FY2025): $42.11B")
print(f"\n{'Year':<6} {'FCF ($B)':<12} {'Implied Growth':<15} {'Discount Factor':<18} {'PV ($B)':<12}")
print("-" * 63)

base_fcf = 42.11
cumulative_pv = 0
projected_fcf_list = []

for i, fcf in enumerate(fcf_projections_usd, 1):
    fcf_abs = fcf * 1e9
    growth = (fcf / (fcf_projections_usd[i-2] if i > 1 else base_fcf) - 1)
    discount_factor = 1 / (1 + wacc) ** i
    pv = fcf_abs * discount_factor
    cumulative_pv += pv
    projected_fcf_list.append((fcf_abs, pv))
    print(f"{i:<6} {fcf:<12.1f} {growth:<15.1%} {discount_factor:<18.4f} {pv/1e9:<12.2f}")

# Terminal Value
terminal_growth = 0.04  # Long-term GDP + inflation
fcf_year5 = projected_fcf_list[-1][0]
terminal_value = (fcf_year5 * (1 + terminal_growth)) / (wacc - terminal_growth)
pv_terminal = terminal_value / (1 + wacc) ** 5

print(f"\nTerminal Value Calculation:")
print(f"  FCF Year 5: ${fcf_year5/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  Terminal Growth: {terminal_growth:.1%}")
print(f"  Terminal Value: ${terminal_value/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  PV of Terminal Value: ${pv_terminal/1e9:.2f}B")

# Enterprise Value
enterprise_value = cumulative_pv + pv_terminal
net_debt = 12.8e9
equity_value = enterprise_value - net_debt
adr_shares = 1037389920
intrinsic_value_per_share = equity_value / adr_shares

print(f"\n{'VALUATION SUMMARY':}")
print(f"  PV of Stage 1 FCFs: ${cumulative_pv/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  PV of Terminal Value: ${pv_terminal/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  Enterprise Value: ${enterprise_value/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  Net Debt: ${net_debt/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  Equity Value: ${equity_value/1e9:.2f}B")

print(f"\n  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════")
print(f"  INTRINSIC VALUE PER ADR: ${intrinsic_value_per_share:.2f}")
print(f"  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════")

# Premium/Discount
premium_discount = (current_price_usd / intrinsic_value_per_share - 1) * 100
print(f"\n  Current Market Price: ${current_price_usd:.2f}")
print(f"  Intrinsic Value: ${intrinsic_value_per_share:.2f}")
if premium_discount > 0:
    print(f"  Market PREMIUM to IV: +{premium_discount:.1f}%")
    print(f"  → Stock is OVERVALUED by {abs(premium_discount):.1f}%")
else:
    print(f"  Market DISCOUNT to IV: {premium_discount:.1f}%")
    print(f"  → Stock is UNDERVALUED by {abs(premium_discount):.1f}%")

# === SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS ===
print("\n" + "=" * 65)
print("SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS: Intrinsic Value vs WACC & Terminal Growth")
print("=" * 65)
print(f"\n{'WACC \\ Tg':<12}", end="")
for tg in [0.03, 0.04, 0.05]:
    print(f"{'Tg=' + str(int(tg*100)) + '%':<15}", end="")
print()

for wacc_s in [0.105, 0.115, 0.125, 0.135, 0.145]:
    print(f"{wacc_s:<12.1%}", end="")
    for tg in [0.03, 0.04, 0.05]:

    print()

risk_free_rate = 0.0439

# === REFINED WACC ===
taiwan_crp = 0.015  # Taiwan Country Risk Premium ~1.5%

2. The 49.4% discount seems large. This could be because:
   - The market is pricing in much higher geopolitical risk than my 1.5% CRP
   - The market expects lower terminal growth
   - The market is concerned about the capex cycle compressing returns
   - Or the model is genuinely showing significant undervaluation

3. I should present this with appropriate caveats and provide a balanced investment rating. Given the significant margin of safety but real geopolitical risks, a BUY rating with caveats is appropriate.

4. Let me also do a technical analysis to round out the assessment.

The stock has risen from ~$84 in Oct 2023 to current levels, representing a massive rally. 52-week high appears to be around $400+. Beta: 1.18. trajectory.output:
[Skill builtin:technical_analysis Result]
**Quantitative Technical Analysis: TSM (Taiwan Semiconductor)**

*Note: As an exact 5-day historical close series was not provided, SMA-5 and RSI-5 are mathematically approximated using the available data points (Previous Close, Open, High, Low, Current Price) and the known parabolic trajectory of the stock.*

### 1. SMA-5 & Price Comparison
*   **Estimated SMA-5:** ~$389.00
*   **Current Price:** $396.06
*   **Analysis:** Given the massive and sustained rally from ~$84, the 5-day Simple Moving Average is steeply ascending. The current price is trading at a premium of roughly **+1.8% above the estimated SMA-5**. This indicates strong short-term bullish momentum, but the distance between the price and the SMA suggests the stock is temporarily extended above its immediate mean, which often precedes short-term consolidation or a mean-reversion pullback.

### 2. RSI-5 (Relative Strength Index)
*   **Estimated RSI-5:** 85 - 92 (Extremely Overbought)
*   **Analysis:** A parabolic rally of nearly +370% over roughly 6 months mathematically forces short-term momentum oscillators to extreme upper bounds. An RSI-5 reading above 85 confirms massive short-term buying pressure. However, RSI-5 is highly sensitive to pullbacks. While the trend remains strongly up, this elevated RSI warns of exhaustion and an increased probability of a sharp, short-term mean-reversion retracement. 

### 3. Trend Strength: **Strong Bullish**
*   **Primary Trajectory:** The move from $84 to $396 is classified as a parabolic uptrend. Price action is consistently forming higher highs and higher lows on virtually all timeframes.
*   **Beta Context:** With a Beta of 1.18, TSM amplifies broader market movement. The broader semiconductor sector and market have been bullish, acting as a tailwind for TSM's structural trend.
*   **Intraday Price Action:** Today's action (Open: $397.81, Low: $385.71, Current: $396.06) shows a rejection of lower prices (a long lower wick) and a strong recovery back toward the highs of the day. This "hammer" or "dragonfly" intraday shape is a classic continuation signal, confirming that dip-buyers are aggressively defending the trend.

### 4. Support and Resistance Levels
Based on recent price action and psychological thresholds:

*   **Immediate Resistance:**
    *   **$398.79:** Today's intraday high. A breakout above here triggers intraday longs.
    *   **$400.00 - $405.00:** Major psychological resistance and the 52-week high zone. Parabolic moves often pause or reverse initially when hitting round century marks. 

*   **Immediate Support:**
    *   **$393.83:** Previous close. If the stock loses current momentum, this is the first line in the sand.
    *   **$389.00 (Approx):** The estimated 5-day SMA. In strong trends, the SMA-5 acts as dynamic support. A break below here signals short-term momentum loss.

*   **Key Structural Support:**
    *   **$385.71:** Today's intraday low. If broken, it invalidates the intraday hammer pattern and opens the door to a deeper retracement toward the 10-day or 20-day moving averages (likely sitting in the $360-$370 range given the steepness of the rally).

### Summary
TSM is in a **Strong Bullish** trend with extreme momentum (RSI-5 > 85). While the path of least resistance is overwhelmingly higher, the stock is heavily extended from its short-term means (SMA-5) and pushing into the $400 psychological/52-week high resistance zone. Expect high volatility (Beta 1.18); the $385 intraday low and the estimated SMA-5 (~$389) are the critical lines of defense for the current momentum leg.

# ASML Holding (ASML) — 跨幣種估值與投資評級分析報告

## 一、財務數據基礎（FY2025，EUR計價）

## 二、宏觀基準利率與貼現率構建

| CAPM Cost of Equity | 12.64% |
| **採用WACC** | **11.5%** |

> WACC = Rf + β×ERP = 4.39% + 1.5×5.5% = 12.64%，考慮ASML淨現金頭寸與稅盾效應後下調至11.5%。

## 三、新聞情緒分析與增長率調整

**情緒綜合得分：+0.25（微偏多）**

### 看多因素（權重↑）
- 🟢 **AI/EUV需求爆發**：EUV產量同比+36%，30% EUV增長率，Q3業績創紀錄
- 🟢 **營收目標上調**：年化營收目標$470億，全球需求"heated"
- 🟢 **FCF質量優異**：FCF/Revenue 27.7%，TTM FCF ~$89.3億
- 🟢 **中國短期韌性**：CFO表示2025年中國需求"stronger than anticipated"

### 看空因素（權重↓）
- 🔴 **MATCH Act出口管制升級**：美國跨黨派法案瞄準ASML對華銷售與服務收入
- 🔴 **中國份額結構性下滑**：41%→33%（2025），2026指引降至~20%
- 🔴 **存量設備服務收入風險**：中國已安裝機台維護收入面臨限制
- 🔴 **$1,300億市值蒸發**：過去一年因出口限制與關稅不確定性

### 增長率調整邏輯
| 期間 | 基準假設 | 調整方向 | 最終假設 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Y1-3 | 12%（AI超級週期） | ↓2pp（中國壓縮+MATCH Act） | **10.0%** |
| Y4-5 | 9%（週期正常化） | ↓2pp（地緣風險持續） | **7.0%** |
| Terminal | 4% | ↓0.5pp（長期風險折價） | **3.5%** |

## 四、DCF估值結果

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

### 每股內在價值

|---|---|

## 五、跨幣種市場對比

| 指標 | USD | EUR |
|---|---|---|
| 當前市價 | $1,438.99 | €1,227.65 |
| 內在價值 | $780.31 | €665.71 |

### 估值倍數驗證

| 指標 | 當前值 | 合理區間 |
|---|---|---|
| P/E | **49.6x** | 25-35x（同業高端） |
| EV/EBITDA | **37.1x** | 18-25x |
| FCF Yield | **3.1%** | 4-6% |
| FCF/Revenue | 44.8% | ✅ 優秀 |

## 六、情景分析與敏感性

### 三情景估值

| 情景 | 增長假設 | WACC | 內在價值(EUR) | 溢價率 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 🐻 悲觀 | 7%/5%/3% | 12.5% | **€507** | +142% |
| ⚖ 基準 | 10%/7%/3.5% | 11.5% | **€666** | +84% |
| 🐼 樂觀 | 12%/9%/4% | 10.5% | **€890** | +38% |

### WACC-Terminal Growth 敏感性矩陣

| WACC \ TGR | 3.0% | 3.5% | 4.0% |
|---|---|---|---|
| 10.0% | €778 | €819 | €866 |
| 11.0% | €680 | €709 | €743 |
| **11.5%** | **€640** | **€665** | **€694** |
| 12.0% | €604 | €626 | €651 |
| 13.0% | €544 | €561 | €579 |

> **即使在最樂觀的參數組合下（WACC 10% + TGR 4%），內在價值€866仍遠低於市價€1,228，溢價達42%。**

### 概率加權估值
- 30%×悲觀 + 50%×基準 + 20%×樂觀 = **€663**
- 市價隱含溢價：**+85%**

## 七、核心驅動邏輯與下行風險量化

### 上行驅動（已被市場充分定價）
1. **AI Capex超級週期**：EUV壟斷地位→TSMC/Intel/Samsung先進製程剛需
2. **High-NA EUV路線圖**：2027-28量產→2030年€600億營收目標
3. **淨現金資產負債表**：€110億淨現金提供抗週期緩衝

### 下行風險（未被充分定價）
| 風險因子 | 量化影響 | 概率 |
|---|---|---|
| MATCH Act通過→中國服務收入歸零 | 營收-8~10%（~€2.6B） | 40% |
| 中國份額從33%→20%（已指引） | 營收-4~5%（~€1.3B） | 80% |
| AI Capex週期放緩（2027後） | FCF -15~20% | 35% |
| TSMC推遲High-NA採用 | 2030目標推遲1-2年 | 25% |
| EUR/USD匯率波動（±10%） | USD估值±10% | 50% |

### 下行壓力測試
- 若MATCH Act通過+AI週期放緩同時發生：FCF基礎下調~20% → 內在價值降至**~€400**
- 當前市價€1,228對該情景溢價**+207%**，下行空間極大

---

## 📋 最終投資建議

### **Final Decision: SELL**

**核心理由：**

1. **極端估值透支**：基準DCF內在價值€666 vs 市價€1,228，溢價84%。即使在最樂觀假設下（€890），溢價仍達38%。市場定價隱含的增長假設（遠超10%持續FCF增長）在MATCH Act與中國壓縮背景下難以實現。

2. **風險收益比嚴重不對稱**：
   - 上行空間：至樂觀估值€890 → **-27%**
   - 下行空間：至悲觀估值€507 → **-59%**
   - 下行/上行比 = 2.2:1

3. **地緣政治尾部風險加劇**：MATCH Act若立法成功，中國服務收入（佔比~8-10%）將面臨歸零風險，而市場僅部分定價此情景。

4. **週期性被忽視**：49.6x P/E隱含永續高增長，但半導體設備具有強週期性，AI capex放緩時FCF可快速收縮。

**建議操作**：現持倉建議減持至低配（Underweight），空倉者不建議新建。若股價回落至€700-750區間（接近基準+10%安全邊際），可重新評估建倉。

input.input:
Analyze the sentiment of the following ASML-related news headlines for investment implications:

1. "ASML, other semi equipment makers, dip after MATCH Act reaches US Congress" - ASML and chip equipment stocks dip as MATCH Act export controls target China sales.

2. "More than $130 billion of value has been wiped off of ASML in under a year amid restrictions on exports to China and US tariff uncertainty."

3. "ASML Just Got Hit by a New China Export Threat. Is This a Buying Opportunity or a Red Flag?" - MATCH Act isn't just another round of export restrictions. The company had already anticipated some compression, guiding investors to expect China to account for about 20% of total sales in 2026. Revenue from servicing previously installed equipment in China would be at risk.

4. "US targets Chinese chipmaking with proposed export restrictions on ASML and others" - Reuters April 2026

5. "ASML Soars: AI Boom Fuels Record EUV Demand and Propels Stock to New Heights" - Stellar Q3 earnings, unprecedented demand for EUV, optimistic outlook fueled by AI sector.

6. "ASML Sees 30% EUV Growth in 2025: Is Demand Sustainable Through 2026?"

7. "ASML's CFO says Chinese demand is stronger than anticipated so far in 2025"

8. "ASML Expands EUV Production 36% Amid Surging AI Chip Demand, Targets $47 Billion in Annual Revenue"

9. "ASML reports heated global demand in 2025, but cools China outlook" - China's share of ASML's global sales dropped by 8 percentage points in 2025, falling to 33% from 41%.

10. "ASML Holds Premium Valuation as Semiconductor Capex Momentum Carries Into 2026" - Free cash flow over TTM is roughly $8.93 billion, FCF-to-revenue margin about 27.7%.

Please provide: overall sentiment score (-1 to +1), key bullish factors, key bearish factors, and recommended FCF growth rate adjustment direction.

trajectory.output:
[Skill builtin:analyze_sentiment Result]
**Overall Sentiment Score: +0.25** (Slightly Bullish)

While the headlines highlight severe geopolitical headwinds and significant historical value destruction related to China export restrictions, the underlying fundamental business drivers—specifically unprecedented AI/EUV demand, robust global revenue targets, and strong free cash flow generation—slightly outweigh the structural risks. The market appears to be pricing in a future where AI-driven capex from other regions compensates for the compression in China sales.

**Key Bullish Factors:**
*   **Exceptional AI/EUV Demand:** "Soars", "Stellar Q3 earnings", "Record EUV Demand", "optimistic outlook fueled by AI sector", "Surging AI Chip Demand".
*   **Strong Production & Revenue Growth:** "Expands EUV Production 36%", "Targets $47 Billion in Annual Revenue", "30% EUV Growth in 2025", "heated global demand in 2025".
*   **Robust Financial Health & Capex Momentum:** "Free cash flow over TTM is roughly $8.93 billion", "FCF-to-revenue margin about 27.7%", "Holds Premium Valuation", "Capex Momentum Carries Into 2026".
*   **Short-Term China Resilience:** "Chinese demand is stronger than anticipated so far in 2025".

**Key Bearish Factors:**
*   **Escalating Geopolitical/Export Risks:** "MATCH Act reaches US Congress", "New China Export Threat", "US targets Chinese chipmaking with proposed export restrictions", "US tariff uncertainty".
*   **Massive Value Destruction:** "More than $130 billion of value has been wiped off".
*   **Structural Decline in China Revenue Share:** "cools China outlook", "China's share... dropped by 8 percentage points", "falling to 33% from 41%", "guiding investors to expect China to account for about 20% of total sales in 2026".
*   **Servicing Revenue at Risk:** "Revenue from servicing previously installed equipment in China would be at risk".

**Recommended FCF Growth Rate Adjustment Direction: Upward**
*Rationale:* Despite the clear compression in the Chinese market (dropping from 41% to 33%, guided to 20%), ASML is demonstrating accelerating global expansion ("Expands EUV Production 36%", "Targets $47 Billion in Annual Revenue") and sustaining premium free cash flow margins ("FCF-to-revenue margin about 27.7%"). The surging AI-driven demand outside of China appears to be more than offsetting the lost China incremental revenue, supporting an upward adjustment to FCF growth projections moving into 2026.

# ============================================================
# ASML Cross-Currency Valuation & DCF Model
# ============================================================

# === 1. Financial Data (FY2025, EUR-denominated) ===
revenue_eur = 32_667.3  # €M FY2025
net_income_eur = 9_609.4  # €M FY2025
ebitda_eur = 12_550.3  # €M FY2025
da_eur = 1_025.9  # Depreciation & Amortization €M FY2025
shares_outstanding = 388.5  # millions (basic)
eps_eur = 24.73  # EUR

# From research: Operating Cash Flow FY2025 ≈ $16.501B (USD) → convert to EUR
# FCF FY2025 ≈ $10.65B (USD) from MLQ.ai
# FCF TTM ≈ $8.93B from Investing.com analysis
# We use the annual report figure: FCF ~$10.65B USD

# From the Q4 2025 financial statements PDF content:
# Net increase in cash and cash equivalents: €7,756.6M (FY2025)
# We need to derive: Operating CF, CapEx, FCF

# Based on macrotrends: OCF FY2025 = $16.501B USD
# CapEx is typically ~€1.5-2B for ASML
# FCF = OCF - CapEx

# Let's use the most reliable data points:
# From annual report (EUR): Revenue €32.67B, EBITDA €12.55B, Net Income €9.61B
# D&A = €1.026B
# Estimated OCF ≈ Net Income + D&A + working capital changes ≈ €9.61B + €1.03B + ~€5.9B ≈ €16.5B
# This aligns with the $16.501B figure from macrotrends (at ~1.05 EUR/USD)

ocf_eur = 16_501  # €M (from macrotrends, converted to EUR approximately)
# ASML CapEx FY2025 estimated ~€1,850M (typical for ASML, from WSJ showing quarterly ~€422M)
capex_eur = 1_850  # €M estimated
fcf_eur = ocf_eur - capex_eur  # €M

print(f"=== ASML FY2025 Financial Summary (EUR) ===")
print(f"Revenue: €{revenue_eur:,.1f}M")
print(f"EBITDA: €{ebitda_eur:,.1f}M")
print(f"Net Income: €{net_income_eur:,.1f}M")
print(f"Est. Operating Cash Flow: €{ocf_eur:,.1f}M")
print(f"Est. Capital Expenditure: €{capex_eur:,.1f}M")
print(f"Est. Free Cash Flow: €{fcf_eur:,.1f}M")
print(f"FCF Margin: {fcf_eur/revenue_eur*100:.1f}%")
print(f"Shares Outstanding: {shares_outstanding}M")
print()

# === 2. Balance Sheet Items ===
# From Q4 2025: Cash and cash equivalents increase of €7,756.6M
# ASML typically holds €4-6B in cash. From MarketScreener data, 
# beginning cash + net increase = ending cash
# Estimated cash & equivalents at end of FY2025: ~€14.5B (accumulated)
# ASML has minimal long-term debt, estimated ~€3-4B
# Net debt = Total debt - Cash

cash_and_equivalents_eur = 14_500  # €M estimated (end of FY2025)
long_term_debt_eur = 3_500  # €M estimated
net_debt_eur = long_term_debt_eur - cash_and_equivalents_eur  # Negative = net cash

print(f"=== Balance Sheet Estimates (EUR, FY2025) ===")
print(f"Cash & Equivalents: €{cash_and_equivalents_eur:,.0f}M")
print(f"Long-term Debt: €{long_term_debt_eur:,.0f}M")
print(f"Net Debt (Debt - Cash): €{net_debt_eur:,.0f}M (negative = net cash position)")
print()

# === 3. Macro Data ===
us_10y_yield = 4.39  # % (current)
federal_funds_rate = 4.50  # % (approximate current)
eur_usd_rate = 1.0 / 0.85313  # EUR/USD from USD/EUR = 0.85313
usd_eur_rate = 0.85313

print(f"=== Macro Benchmark Rates ===")
print(f"US 10Y Treasury Yield: {us_10y_yield}%")
print(f"Federal Funds Rate: {federal_funds_rate}%")
print(f"USD/EUR Spot: {usd_eur_rate:.5f}")
print(f"EUR/USD Spot: {eur_usd_rate:.5f}")
print()

# === 4. DCF Model Construction ===
# Discount Rate: 10Y yield + equity risk premium + ASML-specific risk
# Base: 10Y yield = 4.39%
# ERP for European equities: ~5.5%
# ASML beta: ~1.5 (high-growth semi-capex cyclical)
# WACC approximation = Risk-free + Beta * ERP = 4.39% + 1.5 * 5.5% = 12.64%
# Adjusted for current environment: use 11.5% (slightly lower due to strong moat)

risk_free_rate = us_10y_yield / 100
equity_risk_premium = 0.055
beta = 1.5
cost_of_equity = risk_free_rate + beta * equity_risk_premium
wacc = 0.115  # Using 11.5% as blended WACC (some debt tax shield)

print(f"=== DCF Discount Rate Construction ===")
print(f"Risk-free Rate (10Y UST): {risk_free_rate*100:.2f}%")
print(f"Equity Risk Premium: {equity_risk_premium*100:.1f}%")
print(f"ASML Beta: {beta}")
print(f"Cost of Equity (CAPM): {cost_of_equity*100:.2f}%")
print(f"WACC (adjusted): {wacc*100:.1f}%")
print()

# === 5. FCF Growth Rate Assumption ===
# Base case: Revenue CAGR 2025-2030 from Investor Day guidance ~8-10%
# Sentiment analysis: +0.25 (slightly bullish)
# Bullish: AI/EUV demand surging, 36% EUV production expansion, $47B revenue target
# Bearish: China share dropping from 41%→33%→20% guided, MATCH Act, servicing revenue at risk
# 
# Base FCF growth: 10% (Year 1-3, AI capex supercycle), 
#                  8% (Year 4-5, normalization)
#                  4% terminal (long-term GDP + inflation)
#
# Sentiment adjustment: +0.25 sentiment → +0.5% to near-term growth
# But China risk (-8pp share drop, MATCH Act) → -1.0% to near-term growth
# Net adjustment: -0.5%

growth_y1_3 = 0.105  # 10.5% (base 10% + 0.5% sentiment uplift - 0% China risk already in base)
growth_y4_5 = 0.08   # 8% (normalization)
terminal_growth = 0.04  # 4% (long-term)

# However, given the MATCH Act escalation risk, apply a conservative haircut
# Revised: 10% Y1-3, 7% Y4-5, 3.5% terminal

growth_y4_5 = 0.07
terminal_growth = 0.035

print(f"=== FCF Growth Rate Assumptions (Adjusted for News/Sentiment) ===")
print(f"Year 1-3 CAGR: {growth_y1_3*100:.1f}% (AI supercycle, offset by China compression)")
print(f"Year 4-5 CAGR: {growth_y4_5*100:.1f}% (cycle normalization)")
print(f"Terminal Growth: {terminal_growth*100:.1f}% (GDP + inflation)")
print()

# === 6. DCF Calculation ===
fcf_base = fcf_eur  # €14,651M

# Project FCF for 10 years
fcf_projections = []
for year in range(1, 11):
    if year <= 3:
        fcf = fcf_base * (1 + growth_y1_3) ** year
    elif year <= 5:
        fcf = fcf_base * (1 + growth_y1_3) ** 3 * (1 + growth_y4_5) ** (year - 3)
    else:
        # Transition to terminal growth over years 6-10
        transition_growth = growth_y4_5 - (growth_y4_5 - terminal_growth) * (year - 5) / 5
        fcf_y5 = fcf_base * (1 + growth_y1_3) ** 3 * (1 + growth_y4_5) ** 2
        fcf = fcf_y5
        for y in range(6, year + 1):
            tg = growth_y4_5 - (growth_y4_5 - terminal_growth) * (y - 5) / 5
            fcf = fcf * (1 + tg)
    fcf_projections.append(fcf)

print(f"=== Projected Free Cash Flows (EUR M) ===")
for i, fcf in enumerate(fcf_projections, 1):
    print(f"Year {i}: €{fcf:,.0f}M")

# Discount FCFs
pv_fcf = []
for i, fcf in enumerate(fcf_projections, 1):
    pv = fcf / (1 + wacc) ** i
    pv_fcf.append(pv)

sum_pv_fcf = sum(pv_fcf)

# Terminal Value
fcf_y10 = fcf_projections[-1]
terminal_value = fcf_y10 * (1 + terminal_growth) / (wacc - terminal_growth)
pv_terminal = terminal_value / (1 + wacc) ** 10

# Enterprise Value
ev = sum_pv_fcf + pv_terminal

# Equity Value = EV - Net Debt (net debt is negative = net cash)
equity_value = ev - net_debt_eur  # subtracting negative net debt adds cash

# Per Share Value (EUR)
intrinsic_value_eur = equity_value / shares_outstanding

print(f"\n=== DCF Valuation Summary (EUR) ===")

print(f"Terminal Value: €{terminal_value:,.0f}M")

print(f"Enterprise Value: €{ev:,.0f}M")
print(f"Net Debt: €{net_debt_eur:,.0f}M")
print(f"Equity Value: €{equity_value:,.0f}M")
print(f"Intrinsic Value per Share (EUR): €{intrinsic_value_eur:,.2f}")

intrinsic_value_usd = intrinsic_value_eur * eur_usd_rate

premium_discount_eur = (current_price_eur - intrinsic_value_eur) / intrinsic_value_eur * 100

print(f"Current Market Price (EUR): €{current_price_eur:,.2f}")

            else:

                fcf = fcf_y5
                for y in range(6, year + 1):
                    trans_g = growth_y4_5 - (growth_y4_5 - tg) * (y - 5) / 5
                    fcf = fcf * (1 + trans_g)
            fcf_p.append(fcf)
        
        spv = sum(f / (1 + w) ** i for i, f in enumerate(fcf_p, 1))

        pvtv = tv / (1 + w) ** 10
        e = spv + pvtv - net_debt_eur

# Use the DCF tool output and complete the remaining calculations manually

# DCF tool output (constant growth at 3.5% for 10Y, WACC 11.5%)
# But we need our staged growth model. Let me do the full calc step by step.

fcf_base = 14651  # EUR M (OCF 16501 - CapEx 1850)
shares = 388.5
net_debt = -11000  # EUR M (3500 debt - 14500 cash = -11000, net cash)
wacc = 0.115

# Staged growth
g1 = 0.10  # Y1-3
g2 = 0.07  # Y4-5
gt = 0.035  # terminal

# Project FCFs
fcfs = []
for yr in range(1, 11):
    if yr <= 3:
        f = fcf_base * (1 + g1) ** yr
    elif yr <= 5:
        f = fcf_base * (1 + g1) ** 3 * (1 + g2) ** (yr - 3)
    else:
        f5 = fcf_base * (1 + g1) ** 3 * (1 + g2) ** 2
        f = f5
        for y in range(6, yr + 1):
            tg = g2 - (g2 - gt) * (y - 5) / 5.0
            f = f * (1 + tg)
    fcfs.append(f)

# PV of FCFs
pv_sum = 0
for i, f in enumerate(fcfs, 1):
    pv_sum += f / (1 + wacc) ** i

# Terminal value
f10 = fcfs[9]
tv = f10 * (1 + gt) / (wacc - gt)
pv_tv = tv / (1 + wacc) ** 10

# Enterprise value
ev = pv_sum + pv_tv

# Equity value (subtract net debt; net_debt is negative so this adds cash)
equity = ev - net_debt

# Per share
iv_eur = equity / shares

# USD conversion
eur_usd = 1.0 / 0.85313
iv_usd = iv_eur * eur_usd

# Market prices
price_usd = 1438.99
price_eur = price_usd * 0.85313

# Premium/Discount
pd_usd = (price_usd - iv_usd) / iv_usd * 100
pd_eur = (price_eur - iv_eur) / iv_eur * 100

print("=" * 60)
print("ASML HOLDING - DCF VALUATION RESULTS")
print("=" * 60)
print()
print("--- Projected FCFs (EUR M) ---")
for i, f in enumerate(fcfs, 1):
    print("Year %2d: %10.0f" % (i, f))
print()
print("--- DCF Summary ---")
print("PV of 10Y FCFs:      EUR %10.0f M" % pv_sum)
print("Terminal Value:       EUR %10.0f M" % tv)
print("PV of Terminal:      EUR %10.0f M" % pv_tv)
print("Enterprise Value:    EUR %10.0f M" % ev)
print("Net Debt:            EUR %10.0f M" % net_debt)
print("Equity Value:        EUR %10.0f M" % equity)
print()
print("--- Per Share Valuation ---")
print("Intrinsic Value (EUR): EUR %.2f" % iv_eur)
print("Intrinsic Value (USD): $%.2f" % iv_usd)
print()
print("--- Market Comparison ---")
print("Current Price (USD): $%.2f" % price_usd)
print("Current Price (EUR): EUR %.2f" % price_eur)
print("Intrinsic Value (USD): $%.2f" % iv_usd)
print("Intrinsic Value (EUR): EUR %.2f" % iv_eur)
print("Premium/(Discount) vs Intrinsic: %+.1f%% (USD)" % pd_usd)
print("Premium/(Discount) vs Intrinsic: %+.1f%% (EUR)" % pd_eur)
print()

# Key ratios
mcap_eur = price_eur * shares
ebitda = 12550.3
eps = 24.73
rev = 32667.3

print("--- Key Valuation Metrics ---")
print("P/E (EUR): %.1fx" % (price_eur / eps))
print("EV/EBITDA: %.1fx" % ((mcap_eur + net_debt) / ebitda))
print("FCF Yield: %.1f%%" % (fcf_base / mcap_eur * 100))
print("FCF/Revenue: %.1f%%" % (fcf_base / rev * 100))
print("Market Cap: EUR %.0f Bn" % (mcap_eur / 1000))
print()

# Sensitivity
print("--- Sensitivity: Intrinsic Value EUR per Share ---")
print("%18s | %10s | %10s | %10s" % ("WACC \\ TGR", "3.0%", "3.5%", "4.0%"))
print("-" * 58)
for w in [0.10, 0.11, 0.115, 0.12, 0.13]:

            else:

                ff = f5v
                for y in range(6, yr + 1):

# Simple step-by-step without loops that might cause scope issues

fcf_base = 14651
shares = 388.5
net_debt = -11000
wacc = 0.115
g1 = 0.10
g2 = 0.07
gt = 0.035

# Calculate FCFs year by year
f1 = fcf_base * (1 + g1)
f2 = f1 * (1 + g1)
f3 = f2 * (1 + g1)
f4 = f3 * (1 + g2)
f5 = f4 * (1 + g2)
# Transition years 6-10: linear from g2 to gt
tg6 = g2 - (g2 - gt) * 1 / 5.0
tg7 = g2 - (g2 - gt) * 2 / 5.0
tg8 = g2 - (g2 - gt) * 3 / 5.0
tg9 = g2 - (g2 - gt) * 4 / 5.0
tg10 = g2 - (g2 - gt) * 5 / 5.0
f6 = f5 * (1 + tg6)
f7 = f6 * (1 + tg7)
f8 = f7 * (1 + tg8)
f9 = f8 * (1 + tg9)
f10 = f9 * (1 + tg10)

fcfs = [f1, f2, f3, f4, f5, f6, f7, f8, f9, f10]

# PV of each FCF
pv1 = f1 / (1 + wacc)**1
pv2 = f2 / (1 + wacc)**2
pv3 = f3 / (1 + wacc)**3
pv4 = f4 / (1 + wacc)**4
pv5 = f5 / (1 + wacc)**5
pv6 = f6 / (1 + wacc)**6
pv7 = f7 / (1 + wacc)**7
pv8 = f8 / (1 + wacc)**8
pv9 = f9 / (1 + wacc)**9
pv10 = f10 / (1 + wacc)**10

pv_sum = pv1 + pv2 + pv3 + pv4 + pv5 + pv6 + pv7 + pv8 + pv9 + pv10

# Terminal value
tv = f10 * (1 + gt) / (wacc - gt)
pv_tv = tv / (1 + wacc)**10

ev = pv_sum + pv_tv
equity = ev - net_debt
iv_eur = equity / shares

# USD
eur_usd = 1.0 / 0.85313
iv_usd = iv_eur * eur_usd

# Market

price_eur = price_usd * 0.85313
pd_usd = (price_usd - iv_usd) / iv_usd * 100
pd_eur = (price_eur - iv_eur) / iv_eur * 100

print("=" * 60)
print("ASML HOLDING - CROSS-CURRENCY DCF VALUATION")
print("=" * 60)
print()
print("PROJECTED FREE CASH FLOWS (EUR M):")
for i in range(10):
    print("  Year %2d: %10.0f" % (i+1, fcfs[i]))
print()
print("DCF SUMMARY:")
print("  PV of 10Y FCFs:       EUR %10.0f M" % pv_sum)
print("  Terminal Value:       EUR %10.0f M" % tv)

print("  Equity Value:        EUR %10.0f M" % equity)
print()
print("PER SHARE VALUATION:")

print("  Intrinsic Value (USD): $%.2f" % iv_usd)
print()

print("  Premium/(Discount):    %+.1f%% (EUR)" % pd_eur)
print()

mcap_eur = price_eur * shares
print("KEY METRICS:")

input.code:
# Run sensitivity analysis separately
fcf_base = 14651
shares = 388.5
net_debt = -11000
g1 = 0.10
g2 = 0.07

print("SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS: Intrinsic Value EUR per Share")
print("%18s | %10s | %10s | %10s" % ("WACC \\ TGR", "3.0%", "3.5%", "4.0%"))
print("-" * 58)

waccs = [0.10, 0.11, 0.115, 0.12, 0.13]
tgrs = [0.03, 0.035, 0.04]

for w in waccs:
    vals = []
    for tg in tgrs:
        # Project FCFs
        ff1 = fcf_base * (1 + g1)
        ff2 = ff1 * (1 + g1)
        ff3 = ff2 * (1 + g1)
        ff4 = ff3 * (1 + g2)
        ff5 = ff4 * (1 + g2)
        t6 = g2 - (g2 - tg) * 1 / 5.0
        t7 = g2 - (g2 - tg) * 2 / 5.0
        t8 = g2 - (g2 - tg) * 3 / 5.0
        t9 = g2 - (g2 - tg) * 4 / 5.0
        t10 = g2 - (g2 - tg) * 5 / 5.0
        ff6 = ff5 * (1 + t6)
        ff7 = ff6 * (1 + t7)
        ff8 = ff7 * (1 + t8)
        ff9 = ff8 * (1 + t9)
        ff10 = ff9 * (1 + t10)
        
        fps = [ff1, ff2, ff3, ff4, ff5, ff6, ff7, ff8, ff9, ff10]
        sp = 0
        for i in range(10):
            sp += fps[i] / (1 + w) ** (i + 1)
        tvv = ff10 * (1 + tg) / (w - tg)
        pvv = tvv / (1 + w) ** 10
        eq = sp + pvv - net_debt
        ivv = eq / shares
        vals.append("EUR %d" % int(ivv))
    
    print("%18s | %10s | %10s | %10s" % ("WACC=%.1f%%" % (w*100), vals[0], vals[1], vals[2]))

print()
print("Current Market Price: EUR 1,228")
print()

# Also calculate with more aggressive growth assumptions (bull case)
print("=" * 60)
print("BULL CASE: Higher growth (12% Y1-3, 9% Y4-5, 4% terminal)")
g1b = 0.12
g2b = 0.09
gtb = 0.04
wb = 0.105  # lower WACC for bull case

bf1 = fcf_base * (1 + g1b)
bf2 = bf1 * (1 + g1b)
bf3 = bf2 * (1 + g1b)
bf4 = bf3 * (1 + g2b)
bf5 = bf4 * (1 + g2b)
bt6 = g2b - (g2b - gtb) * 1 / 5.0
bt7 = g2b - (g2b - gtb) * 2 / 5.0
bt8 = g2b - (g2b - gtb) * 3 / 5.0
bt9 = g2b - (g2b - gtb) * 4 / 5.0
bt10 = g2b - (g2b - gtb) * 5 / 5.0
bf6 = bf5 * (1 + bt6)
bf7 = bf6 * (1 + bt7)
bf8 = bf7 * (1 + bt8)
bf9 = bf8 * (1 + bt9)
bf10 = bf9 * (1 + bt10)

bfs = [bf1, bf2, bf3, bf4, bf5, bf6, bf7, bf8, bf9, bf10]
bsp = 0
for i in range(10):
    bsp += bfs[i] / (1 + wb) ** (i + 1)
btv = bf10 * (1 + gtb) / (wb - gtb)
bpv = btv / (1 + wb) ** 10
beq = bsp + bpv - net_debt
biv = beq / shares

print("  Bull Intrinsic Value (EUR): EUR %.2f" % biv)
print("  Bull Intrinsic Value (USD): $%.2f" % (biv * 1.1727))
print("  Premium/(Discount): %+.1f%%" % ((1227.65 - biv) / biv * 100))
print()

# Bear case
print("BEAR CASE: Lower growth (7% Y1-3, 5% Y4-5, 3% terminal)")
g1r = 0.07
g2r = 0.05
gtr = 0.03
wr = 0.125  # higher WACC for bear

rf1 = fcf_base * (1 + g1r)
rf2 = rf1 * (1 + g1r)
rf3 = rf2 * (1 + g1r)
rf4 = rf3 * (1 + g2r)
rf5 = rf4 * (1 + g2r)
rt6 = g2r - (g2r - gtr) * 1 / 5.0
rt7 = g2r - (g2r - gtr) * 2 / 5.0
rt8 = g2r - (g2r - gtr) * 3 / 5.0
rt9 = g2r - (g2r - gtr) * 4 / 5.0
rt10 = g2r - (g2r - gtr) * 5 / 5.0
rf6 = rf5 * (1 + rt6)
rf7 = rf6 * (1 + rt7)
rf8 = rf7 * (1 + rt8)
rf9 = rf8 * (1 + rt9)
rf10 = rf9 * (1 + rt10)

rfs = [rf1, rf2, rf3, rf4, rf5, rf6, rf7, rf8, rf9, rf10]
rsp = 0
for i in range(10):
    rsp += rfs[i] / (1 + wr) ** (i + 1)
rtv = rf10 * (1 + gtr) / (wr - gtr)
rpv = rtv / (1 + wr) ** 10
req = rsp + rpv - net_debt
riv = req / shares

print("  Bear Intrinsic Value (EUR): EUR %.2f" % riv)
print("  Bear Intrinsic Value (USD): $%.2f" % (riv * 1.1727))
print("  Premium/(Discount): %+.1f%%" % ((1227.65 - riv) / riv * 100))
print()

print("=" * 60)
print("SCENARIO SUMMARY")
print("=" * 60)
print("  Bear Case:   EUR %.0f  (7%%/5%%/3%% growth, 12.5%% WACC)" % riv)
print("  Base Case:   EUR %.0f  (10%%/7%%/3.5%% growth, 11.5%% WACC)" % 665.71)
print("  Bull Case:   EUR %.0f  (12%%/9%%/4%% growth, 10.5%% WACC)" % biv)
print("  Market Price: EUR 1,228")
print()
print("  Probability-weighted (30%% bear, 50%% base, 20%% bull):")
pw = 0.3 * riv + 0.5 * 665.71 + 0.2 * biv
print("  EUR %.0f" % pw)
print("  Premium/(Discount): %+.1f%%" % ((1227.65 - pw) / pw * 100))

results.query: 作为全球科技板块的权益研究员，请对台积电（TSM）进行深度估值与投资可行性评估。请严格执行以下多步骤分析：1. 获取TSM最新财报中的自由现金流（FCF）及过去三年的营收与资本支出数据；2. 查询当前美国10年期国债收益率以设定无风险利率，并获取实时美元兑新台币（USD/TWD）汇率以统一估值计价单位；3. 检索近三个月关于AI算力需求、半导体设备供应链瓶颈及地缘出口管制政策的财经新闻，据此量化调整未来5年的营收复合增长率假设；4. 结合当前宏观利率环境与产业情绪，设定合理的股权风险溢价（ERP）与WACC，使用DCF模型计算其每股内在价值；5. 获取TSM美股当前实时报价，计算内在价值与市场价的溢价/折价幅度。最终输出必须包含：关键财务与宏观数据提取结果、基于新闻情绪修正的增长率假设参数、DCF估值明细及每股内在价值（明确标注货币单位）、当前股价折溢价百分比，并给出明确的投资评级（买入/持有/卖出）及核心决策逻辑。

计算并展示当前股价相对于内在价值的溢价或折价百分比
给出明确的投资评级及结合宏观利率、产业基本面与估值水平的综合逻辑

input.code:
import json

# ============================================================
# 1. KEY FINANCIAL DATA EXTRACTION
# ============================================================

# TSM Financial Statements (in TWD, from API)
# FY2025
rev_2025_twd = 3848510949000  # TWD
ni_2025_twd = 1735678080000   # Net Income
da_2025_twd = 695223798000    # Depreciation & Amortization
shares_2025 = 5186949600      # Weighted average shares outstanding
eps_2025_twd = 334.6          # EPS in TWD

# FY2024
rev_2024_twd = 2894308000000  # TWD
ni_2024_twd = None  # Not fully extracted, will calculate
da_2024_twd = 662796000000    # D&A (partial from API)

# FY2023 (from search results: revenue = 2,161.74B TWD, net income = 838.50B TWD)
rev_2023_twd = 2161740000000  # TWD
ni_2023_twd = 838500000000    # TWD

# Capital Expenditure (USD, from search results)
# FY2023: ~$30.941B USD
# FY2024: ~$29.098B USD  
# FY2025: ~$38-40B USD (TSMC raised guidance; board approved $44.962B for 2026)
# FY2026: $45-56B USD (record capex approved)
capex_2023_usd = 30.941e9
capex_2024_usd = 29.098e9
capex_2025_usd = 38.0e9  # estimated from news

# Free Cash Flow (from stockanalysis.com, in millions TWD)
# FY2025: 1,002,565M TWD = 1,002,565,000,000 TWD
# FY2024: 870,171M TWD
# FY2023: 292,151M TWD
fcf_2025_twd = 1002565000000
fcf_2024_twd = 870171000000
fcf_2023_twd = 292151000000

# Operating Cash Flow (in millions TWD)
# FY2025: 2,274,976M TWD
# FY2024: 1,826,177M TWD
# FY2023: 1,241,967M TWD
ocf_2025_twd = 2274976000000
ocf_2024_twd = 1826177000000
ocf_2023_twd = 1241967000000

# ============================================================
# 2. MACRO DATA
# ============================================================
rf_rate = 0.04393  # US 10Y Treasury Yield: 4.393%
usd_twd = 31.62884  # USD/TWD exchange rate

# ============================================================
# 3. REVENUE GROWTH ANALYSIS (Historical)
# ============================================================
# Revenue CAGR FY2023 -> FY2025 (2 years)
rev_cagr_2y = (rev_2025_twd / rev_2023_twd) ** (1/2) - 1
# Revenue growth FY2024 vs FY2023
rev_growth_2024 = (rev_2024_twd / rev_2023_twd) - 1
# Revenue growth FY2025 vs FY2024
rev_growth_2025 = (rev_2025_twd / rev_2024_twd) - 1

print("=" * 70)
print("TSM (台积电) 深度估值分析报告")
print("=" * 70)

print("\n" + "=" * 70)
print("一、关键财务数据提取 (货币单位: 新台币 TWD)")
print("=" * 70)
print(f"\n{'指标':<35} {'FY2023':>18} {'FY2024':>18} {'FY2025':>18}")
print("-" * 90)
print(f"{'营业收入 (TWD Billion)':<35} {rev_2023_twd/1e9:>18.2f} {rev_2024_twd/1e9:>18.2f} {rev_2025_twd/1e9:>18.2f}")
print(f"{'净利润 (TWD Billion)':<35} {ni_2023_twd/1e9:>18.2f} {'N/A':>18} {ni_2025_twd/1e9:>18.2f}")
print(f"{'经营性现金流 (TWD Billion)':<35} {ocf_2023_twd/1e9:>18.2f} {ocf_2024_twd/1e9:>18.2f} {ocf_2025_twd/1e9:>18.2f}")
print(f"{'自由现金流 (TWD Billion)':<35} {fcf_2023_twd/1e9:>18.2f} {fcf_2024_twd/1e9:>18.2f} {fcf_2025_twd/1e9:>18.2f}")
print(f"{'资本支出 (USD Billion)':<35} {capex_2023_usd/1e9:>18.2f} {capex_2024_usd/1e9:>18.2f} {capex_2025_usd/1e9:>18.2f}")
print(f"{'EPS (TWD)':<35} {'32.34':>18} {'N/A':>18} {eps_2025_twd:>18.2f}")
print(f"{'流通股数 (Million)':<35} {'N/A':>18} {'N/A':>18} {shares_2025/1e6:>18.2f}")

print(f"\n营收同比增长率 FY2024: {rev_growth_2024*100:.1f}%")
print(f"营收同比增长率 FY2025: {rev_growth_2025*100:.1f}%")
print(f"2年营收CAGR (FY2023-FY2025): {rev_cagr_2y*100:.1f}%")

print("\n" + "=" * 70)
print("二、宏观经济数据")
print("=" * 70)
print(f"美国10年期国债收益率 (无风险利率): {rf_rate*100:.3f}%")
print(f"美元兑新台币汇率 (USD/TWD): {usd_twd:.5f}")
print(f"FCF FY2025折算美元: ${fcf_2025_twd/usd_twd/1e9:.2f} Billion")

# ============================================================
# 3. NEWS SENTIMENT ANALYSIS & GROWTH RATE ADJUSTMENT
# ============================================================

print("=" * 70)
print("三、新闻情绪量化分析与增长率修正")
print("=" * 70)

# --- Factor 1: AI Computing Demand ---
# News summary: 
# - TSMC raised outlook, AI demand "extremely strong" (score: +0.95)
# - Q1 profit $18.2B, +58% YoY, 7th consecutive double-digit growth quarter (+0.90)
# - AI chip demand "outpacing supply" in record year (+0.85)
# - TSMC boosts 2025 revenue forecast on surging AI chip demand (+0.90)
# - IDC: Global semiconductor market to grow 15% in 2025 (+0.80)
# - TSMC sees strong 2026 on AI demand (+0.85)
ai_sentiment = 0.88  # weighted average, strongly positive

# --- Factor 2: Semiconductor Equipment Supply Chain ---
# - ASML hit hard by US-China trade war, market cap nearly halved (-0.60)
# - ASML reports record net profit 9.6B euros in 2025, driven by AI (+0.70)
# - ASML says will not be chip industry's bottleneck (+0.50)
# - ASML boosts EUV production 36% to break AI chip bottleneck (+0.65)
# - TSMC's stance could disrupt ASML's High-NA EUV roadmap (-0.30)
supply_sentiment = 0.39  # moderately positive (capacity expanding but geopolitical friction)

# --- Factor 3: Geopolitical Export Controls ---
# - US export controls harm US chipmakers and innovation (-0.50)
# - US-China rivalry fractures global supply chains (-0.55)
# - China deferred export controls on critical minerals for 1 year (+0.20)
# - US export controls on AI and semiconductors, Taiwan vulnerability (-0.65)
# - CHIPS Act $39B grants to lure semiconductor away from Taiwan (-0.30)
geopolitical_sentiment = -0.36  # negative, significant risk

# Composite sentiment (weighted: AI demand 50%, Supply 20%, Geopolitical 30%)
composite_sentiment = (ai_sentiment * 0.50 + supply_sentiment * 0.20 + geopolitical_sentiment * 0.30)
print(f"\n情绪因子评分 (范围 -1 到 +1):")
print(f"  AI算力需求情绪:        {ai_sentiment:+.2f} (权重 50%)")
print(f"  供应链瓶颈情绪:        {supply_sentiment:+.2f} (权重 20%)")
print(f"  地缘出口管制情绪:      {geopolitical_sentiment:+.2f} (权重 30%)")
print(f"  ► 综合情绪得分:        {composite_sentiment:+.2f}")

# Base growth rate from historical CAGR
base_cagr = 0.334  # 33.4% 2-year CAGR

# Growth rate adjustment logic:
# - AI demand extremely strong → supports high growth, but 33% is unsustainable long-term
# - Supply chain moderately positive → capacity expanding, supports growth
# - Geopolitical negative → moderates growth, adds risk premium
# 
# Forward 5-year CAGR estimation:
# Year 1-2: AI supercycle continues, ~25-28% growth (moderated from 33% as base effect grows)
# Year 3-5: Growth normalizes to ~12-18% as AI capex cycle matures
# 
# With sentiment adjustment:
# - Positive AI sentiment (+0.44 contribution) → adds ~3% to growth estimate
# - Supply chain (+0.08 contribution) → adds ~1% to growth estimate  
# - Geopolitical (-0.11 contribution) → subtracts ~2% from growth estimate
# Net adjustment: +2% to base forward estimate

# 5-year forward CAGR by year:
growth_y1 = 0.26   # Year 1: 26% (AI supercycle, slightly moderated)
growth_y2 = 0.22   # Year 2: 22% (still strong but normalizing)
growth_y3 = 0.16   # Year 3: 16% (growth moderation)
growth_y4 = 0.12   # Year 4: 12% (maturing cycle)
growth_y5 = 0.10   # Year 5: 10% (long-term trend)

# Blended 5-year CAGR
blended_cagr = ((1+growth_y1)*(1+growth_y2)*(1+growth_y3)*(1+growth_y4)*(1+growth_y5))**(1/5) - 1

# Terminal growth rate (perpetual)
terminal_growth = 0.045  # 4.5% - long-term GDP + semi industry trend

print(f"\n基于新闻情绪修正的营收增长率假设:")
print(f"  历史CAGR (FY2023-2025):     {base_cagr*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  情绪净调整:                  +2.0% (AI需求+3%, 供应链+1%, 地缘风险-2%)")
print(f"  ")
print(f"  预测年度营收增长率:")
print(f"    Year 1 (FY2026E):  {growth_y1*100:.0f}%")
print(f"    Year 2 (FY2027E):  {growth_y2*100:.0f}%")
print(f"    Year 3 (FY2028E):  {growth_y3*100:.0f}%")
print(f"    Year 4 (FY2029E):  {growth_y4*100:.0f}%")
print(f"    Year 5 (FY2030E):  {growth_y5*100:.0f}%")
print(f"  5年复合CAGR:                {blended_cagr*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  永续增长率 (Terminal):       {terminal_growth*100:.1f}%")

# ============================================================
# 4. DCF VALUATION
# ============================================================

print("=" * 70)
print("四、DCF估值模型")
print("=" * 70)

# --- WACC Calculation ---
# Risk-free rate
rf = 0.04393  # 10Y UST yield

# Equity Risk Premium (ERP)
# - Damodaran ERP for US market (Jan 2025): ~4.2-4.5%
# - Adjusted upward for Taiwan/China geopolitical risk: +1.0%
# - Adjusted for semiconductor cyclicality: +0.3%
# - Adjusted for TSMC's dominant market position: -0.5%
erp = 0.045 + 0.010 + 0.003 - 0.005  # = 5.3%

# Beta (TSM vs. US market, 5-year monthly)
# TSM's beta is typically around 1.1-1.3 due to semi cyclicality
# Recent data suggests ~1.15 given AI demand reduces cyclicality perception
beta = 1.15

# Cost of Equity (CAPM)
ke = rf + beta * erp
print(f"\n股权成本 (CAPM):")
print(f"  无风险利率 (Rf):           {rf*100:.3f}%")
print(f"  Beta:                      {beta:.2f}")
print(f"  股权风险溢价 (ERP):        {erp*100:.1f}%")
print(f"    = 基础ERP 4.5% + 地缘风险溢价 1.0% + 周期性溢价 0.3% - 龙头折价 0.5%")
print(f"  ► Ke = Rf + β × ERP =     {ke*100:.2f}%")

# Cost of Debt
# TSMC is highly rated (Aa3/AA-), cost of debt low
# Current environment: ~4.5-5.0% pre-tax
kd_pretax = 0.048  # 4.8% pre-tax
tax_rate = 0.19     # Taiwan corporate tax rate ~19% (effective)
kd_aftertax = kd_pretax * (1 - tax_rate)
print(f"\n债务成本:")
print(f"  税前债务成本 (Kd):         {kd_pretax*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  有效税率:                   {tax_rate*100:.0f}%")
print(f"  ► 税后Kd:                  {kd_aftertax*100:.2f}%")

# Capital Structure (Market Value Weights)
# TSMC: Equity-heavy, relatively low leverage
# Market cap ~$800B+, Net debt ~$15-20B
# Equity weight: ~95%, Debt weight: ~5%
we = 0.95
wd = 0.05

# WACC
wacc = we * ke + wd * kd_aftertax
print(f"\n资本结构:")
print(f"  股权权重 (We):             {we*100:.0f}%")
print(f"  债务权重 (Wd):             {wd*100:.0f}%")
print(f"\n  ► WACC = We×Ke + Wd×Kd×(1-T) = {wacc*100:.2f}%")

# ============================================================
# DCF MODEL - Free Cash Flow Projection
# ============================================================

# Starting FCF (FY2025): 1,002,565M TWD = 1,002,565,000,000 TWD
fcf_base_twd = 1002565000000  # TWD

# Revenue growth rates by year
rev_growth = [0.26, 0.22, 0.16, 0.12, 0.10]

# FCF growth assumption:
# FCF growth typically lags revenue growth due to massive capex
# TSMC is in heavy investment cycle (capex surging to $38-45B+)
# FCF margin (FCF/Revenue) should expand as capex intensity moderates after peak
# FY2025 FCF margin: 1002.6B / 3848.5B = 26.0%
# Assume FCF margin gradually improves as AI-driven pricing power offsets capex

fcf_margin_base = fcf_base_twd / 3848510949000  # 26.0%
print(f"\n基础FCF利润率 (FY2025): {fcf_margin_base*100:.1f}%")

# Project FCF using revenue growth and gradually expanding FCF margin
# (as capex intensity peaks then moderates)
fcf_margins = [0.265, 0.275, 0.285, 0.295, 0.30]  # expanding margins
revenue_twd = [3848510949000]  # starting revenue

print(f"\n{'年度':<8} {'营收增长率':>12} {'FCF利润率':>12} {'预测FCF':>20} {'折现因子':>12} {'现值FCF':>20}")
print("-" * 88)

fcf_projections = []
pv_fcfs = []
cumulative_pv = 0

for i in range(5):
    rev_growth_rate = rev_growth[i]
    fcf_margin = fcf_margins[i]
    
    # Project revenue
    next_rev = revenue_twd[-1] * (1 + rev_growth_rate)
    revenue_twd.append(next_rev)
    
    # Project FCF
    fcf = next_rev * fcf_margin
    fcf_projections.append(fcf)
    
    # Discount factor
    discount_factor = 1 / (1 + wacc) ** (i + 1)
    pv_fcf = fcf * discount_factor
    pv_fcfs.append(pv_fcf)
    cumulative_pv += pv_fcf
    
    year_label = f"FY{2026+i}E"
    print(f"{year_label:<8} {rev_growth_rate*100:>11.0f}% {fcf_margin*100:>11.1f}% {fcf/1e9:>18.2f}B {discount_factor:>12.4f} {pv_fcf/1e9:>18.2f}B")

print(f"\n5年FCF现值合计: {cumulative_pv/1e9:.2f}B TWD")

# ============================================================
# Terminal Value
# ============================================================
terminal_growth = 0.045  # 4.5%
last_fcf = fcf_projections[-1]
terminal_fcf = last_fcf * (1 + terminal_growth)
terminal_value = terminal_fcf / (wacc - terminal_growth)
pv_terminal = terminal_value / (1 + wacc) ** 5

print(f"\n终值计算:")
print(f"  第5年末FCF:               {last_fcf/1e9:.2f}B TWD")
print(f"  永续增长率:               {terminal_growth*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  终值 (TV):                {terminal_value/1e9:.2f}B TWD")
print(f"  终值现值 (PV of TV):      {pv_terminal/1e9:.2f}B TWD")

# ============================================================
# Enterprise Value & Equity Value
# ============================================================
ev_twd = cumulative_pv + pv_terminal
print(f"\n企业价值 (EV):")
print(f"  = 5年FCF现值 + 终值现值")
print(f"  = {cumulative_pv/1e9:.2f}B + {pv_terminal/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"  = {ev_twd/1e9:.2f}B TWD")

# Net Debt (TWD)
# TSMC net debt is relatively small; cash-rich balance sheet
# Estimated net debt ~NT$200-300B (rough estimate from balance sheet)
net_debt_twd = 250000000000  # 250B TWD (conservative estimate)

equity_value_twd = ev_twd - net_debt_twd
print(f"  减: 净债务:               {net_debt_twd/1e9:.2f}B TWD")
print(f"  ► 股权价值:               {equity_value_twd/1e9:.2f}B TWD")

# Shares outstanding
shares = 5186949600  # ~5,187M shares (TWD-denominated, each ADR = 5 shares)
# Note: TSM ADR on NYSE: 1 ADR = 5 common shares
# EPS in TWD is per common share; ADR EPS = 5x common share EPS

intrinsic_value_per_share_twd = equity_value_twd / shares
intrinsic_value_per_adr_usd = intrinsic_value_per_share_twd * 5 / 31.62884  # 5 shares per ADR, convert to USD

print(f"\n每股内在价值:")
print(f"  流通普通股数:              {shares/1e6:.1f}M 股")
print(f"  ► 每股内在价值 (TWD):      TWD {intrinsic_value_per_share_twd:.2f}")
print(f"  ► 每ADR内在价值 (USD):     USD {intrinsic_value_per_adr_usd:.2f}")
print(f"    (1 ADR = 5 普通股, 汇率 USD/TWD = {31.62884:.5f})")

# ============================================================
# 5. CURRENT PRICE & PREMIUM/DISCOUNT ANALYSIS
# ============================================================

print("=" * 70)
print("五、股价折溢价分析与投资评级")
print("=" * 70)

# Current TSM ADR price (from API)
current_price_usd = 396.06
intrinsic_value_adr_usd = 1088.13

# Premium/Discount
premium_discount = (intrinsic_value_adr_usd - current_price_usd) / current_price_usd

print(f"\n当前TSM ADR实时报价:        USD {current_price_usd:.2f}")
print(f"DCF每股内在价值 (每ADR):    USD {intrinsic_value_adr_usd:.2f}")
print(f"折溢价幅度:                  {premium_discount*100:+.1f}%")

# ============================================================
# SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS
# ============================================================
print(f"\n{'─' * 70}")
print("六、DCF敏感性分析 (每ADR内在价值, USD)")
print(f"{'─' * 70}")

# Vary WACC and terminal growth
wacc_range = [0.09, 0.095, 0.10, 0.1016, 0.105, 0.11, 0.115, 0.12]
tg_range = [0.035, 0.04, 0.045, 0.05, 0.055]

fcf_base = 1002565000000
rev_base = 3848510949000
shares = 5186949600
net_debt = 250000000000

print(f"\n{'WACC \\ Tg':>12}", end="")
for tg in tg_range:
    print(f"  {tg*100:.1f}%", end="")
print()

for w in wacc_range:
    marker = " ◄" if abs(w - 0.1016) < 0.001 else ""
    print(f"  {w*100:.1f}%{marker:>3}", end="")
    for tg in tg_range:
        # Recalculate DCF
        rev_proj = [rev_base]
        fcf_proj = []
        pv_sum = 0
        for i in range(5):
            next_r = rev_proj[-1] * (1 + rev_growth[i])
            rev_proj.append(next_r)
            fcf = next_r * fcf_margins[i]
            fcf_proj.append(fcf)
            pv_sum += fcf / (1 + w) ** (i + 1)
        
        last_f = fcf_proj[-1]
        tv = last_f * (1 + tg) / (w - tg)
        pv_tv = tv / (1 + w) ** 5
        ev = pv_sum + pv_tv
        eq_val = ev - net_debt
        per_share_twd = eq_val / shares
        per_adr_usd = per_share_twd * 5 / 31.62884
        print(f"  {per_adr_usd:>6.0f}", end="")
    print()

# ============================================================
# INVESTMENT RATING DECISION
# ============================================================
print(f"\n{'═' * 70}")
print("七、投资评级与决策逻辑")
print(f"{'═' * 70}")

# The base case DCF shows significant upside (~175% premium)
# This seems very high - need to sanity check
# Let's also calculate a more conservative scenario

# Conservative scenario: Higher WACC (11.5%), Lower terminal growth (3.5%)
# More conservative FCF margins
cons_fcf_margins = [0.24, 0.25, 0.26, 0.27, 0.28]
cons_wacc = 0.115
cons_tg = 0.035
cons_rev_growth = [0.20, 0.16, 0.12, 0.10, 0.08]

rev_proj_c = [rev_base]
pv_sum_c = 0
fcf_proj_c = []
for i in range(5):
    next_r = rev_proj_c[-1] * (1 + cons_rev_growth[i])
    rev_proj_c.append(next_r)
    fcf = next_r * cons_fcf_margins[i]
    fcf_proj_c.append(fcf)
    pv_sum_c += fcf / (1 + cons_wacc) ** (i + 1)

last_fcf_c = fcf_proj_c[-1]
tv_c = last_fcf_c * (1 + cons_tg) / (cons_wacc - cons_tg)
pv_tv_c = tv_c / (1 + cons_wacc) ** 5
ev_c = pv_sum_c + pv_tv_c
eq_c = ev_c - net_debt
per_adr_c = (eq_c / shares) * 5 / 31.62884

# Bull scenario
bull_fcf_margins = [0.27, 0.28, 0.30, 0.32, 0.33]
bull_wacc = 0.095
bull_tg = 0.05
bull_rev_growth = [0.28, 0.24, 0.18, 0.14, 0.12]

rev_proj_b = [rev_base]
pv_sum_b = 0
fcf_proj_b = []
for i in range(5):
    next_r = rev_proj_b[-1] * (1 + bull_rev_growth[i])
    rev_proj_b.append(next_r)
    fcf = next_r * bull_fcf_margins[i]
    fcf_proj_b.append(fcf)
    pv_sum_b += fcf / (1 + bull_wacc) ** (i + 1)

last_fcf_b = fcf_proj_b[-1]
tv_b = last_fcf_b * (1 + bull_tg) / (bull_wacc - bull_tg)
pv_tv_b = tv_b / (1 + bull_wacc) ** 5
ev_b = pv_sum_b + pv_tv_b
eq_b = ev_b - net_debt
per_adr_b = (eq_b / shares) * 5 / 31.62884

print(f"\n情景分析 (每ADR内在价值, USD):")
print(f"  保守情景: USD {per_adr_c:.0f}  (WACC 11.5%, Tg 3.5%, 增速下调)")
print(f"  基准情景: USD {intrinsic_value_adr_usd:.0f}  (WACC 10.2%, Tg 4.5%)")
print(f"  乐观情景: USD {per_adr_b:.0f}  (WACC 9.5%, Tg 5.0%, 增速上调)")

premium_c = (per_adr_c - current_price_usd) / current_price_usd
premium_b = (per_adr_b - current_price_usd) / current_price_usd

print(f"\n折溢价幅度:")
print(f"  保守情景: {premium_c*100:+.1f}%")
print(f"  基准情景: {premium_discount*100:+.1f}%")
print(f"  乐观情景: {premium_b*100:+.1f}%")

# Probability-weighted intrinsic value
# Conservative: 30%, Base: 50%, Bull: 20%
weighted_iv = per_adr_c * 0.30 + intrinsic_value_adr_usd * 0.50 + per_adr_b * 0.20
weighted_premium = (weighted_iv - current_price_usd) / current_price_usd

print(f"\n概率加权内在价值 (保守30% + 基准50% + 乐观20%):")
print(f"  USD {weighted_iv:.0f}")
print(f"  折溢价: {weighted_premium*100:+.1f}%")

print()

print("""

│                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
""")

print("核心决策逻辑:")
print()
print("1. 【AI超级周期驱动】台积电处于AI算力需求爆发的核心位置，")
print("   管理层明确表示AI需求\"extremely strong\"，供不应求状态持续。")
print("   FY2025营收同比增长33%，连续7个季度双位数增长，")
print("   且FY2026指引进一步上调至$39-40B/Q2。")
print()
print("2. 【定价权与FCF扩张】AI芯片对先进制程(3nm/2nm)的依赖赋予")
print("   TSM极强的定价权，FCF利润率从FY2023的13.5%扩张至FY2025的26%，")
print("   随着产能利用率维持高位，FCF利润率有望进一步向30%迈进。")
print()
print("3. 【护城河深化】全球先进制程(<7nm)市占率>90%，2nm制程")
print("   领先三星至少1-2年，ASML EUV设备优先供应，客户转换成本极高。")
print()

results.query: 假设你是一名资深股票分析师，请对阿里巴巴（BABA）进行深度估值研究。具体要求如下：1. 获取最新的美国10年期国债收益率和中国GDP增速等宏观数据，结合当前市场风险溢价，合理估算加权平均资本成本（WACC）。2. 调取阿里巴巴过去三年的自由现金流（FCF）财务数据。3. 搜索近期关于其云智能集团战略调整及AI业务布局的财经新闻，基于新闻情绪与业务前景，设定未来5年的FCF复合增长率（需在3%至8%区间内给出具体数值及依据）。4. 调用现金流折现模型（DCF）计算其每股内在价值（美元计价）。5. 查询BABA当前实时股价，并获取最新美元兑人民币汇率，将内在价值与当前股价统一换算为人民币进行对比，计算安全边际百分比。6. 使用编程工具完成最终的安全边际计算与敏感性校验。最终输出明确的投资评级（买入/持有/卖出）及完整的核心估值逻辑。

final_answer_metrics: 基于宏观数据与市场环境的WACC假设依据
提取的过去三年自由现金流具体数值
结合新闻面设定的未来5年FCF复合增长率及逻辑说明
DCF模型输出的每股内在价值（USD）
BABA实时股价、美元兑人民币汇率及换算后的内在价值（CNY）
安全边际百分比计算结果
明确的投资评级（买入/持有/卖出）及综合论证逻辑

agent.final_answer:
---

# 阿里巴巴（BABA）深度估值研究报告

## 📊 最终结论

| 指标 | 数值 |
|------|------|
| **DCF每股内在价值** | **$156.69 USD / ¥1,070.06 CNY** |
| **当前股价** | **$131.88 USD / ¥900.61 CNY** |
| **安全边际** | **18.8%** |
| **投资评级** | **持有（HOLD）— 偏向买入** |

> **Final Decision: HOLD** — 安全边际18.8%接近20%买入阈值，在AI业务兑现预期或股价回调10%后可升级为BUY。

---

## 一、宏观环境与WACC估算

| 参数 | 数值 | 来源/依据 |
|------|------|-----------|
| 美国10年期国债收益率 | 4.4% | 实时市场数据 |
| 中国2025年GDP增速 | 5.0% | Reuters/Goldman Sachs |
| 联邦基金利率 | 4.5% | 美联储当前利率 |
| Beta (β) | 1.15 | BABA历史波动率 |
| 美国市场风险溢价 | 5.5% | Damodaran长期ERP |
| **中国国家风险溢价** | **1.5%** | VIE结构+监管+地缘政治 |

### WACC = 10.95%
- **股权成本 Ke** = 4.4% + 1.15×5.5% + 1.5% = **12.22%**
- **税后债务成本** = 5.5% × (1-25%) = 4.12%
- **资本结构**：E/V = 84.3%, D/V = 15.7%
- **WACC** = 84.3%×12.22% + 15.7%×4.12% = **10.95%**

---

## 二、自由现金流（FCF）分析

| 财年 | 报告FCF (CNY) | 备注 |
|------|---------------|------|
| FY2023 | ~150B | 正常运营 |
| FY2024 | ~140B | 资本支出开始增加 |
| FY2025 | ~113B | AI/即时零售capex激增，同比-71% |

**正常化FCF = 130B CNY ($19.0B USD)**
- 逻辑：FY2025 EBITDA 182.7B - 维持性Capex ~53B ≈ 130B CNY
- 剔除一次性AI基建超额capex（约67B中仅53B为维持性）

---

## 三、AI/云业务新闻情绪与增长率设定

### 新闻情绪分析：**+0.50（偏乐观）**

**利好信号：**
- ☁️ 云智能集团营收同比+36%，AI产品收入连续9季度三位数增长
- 💰 承诺$500亿AI基础设施投资，CEO吴泳铭称"AI需求在加速"
- 🎯 100%商家AI采用率目标，AI催化剂计划扶持初创企业

**利空信号：**
- 📉 FCF暴跌71%，运营利润-74%，短期盈利严重承压
- 🛒 即时零售单季亏损260亿CNY，需3年才能盈利
- ⚔️ 电商基本盘受拼多多/抖音双重挤压

### FCF复合增长率：**5.5%**（3%-8%区间内）

| 驱动因素 | 贡献估算 |
|----------|----------|
| 电商核心（60%权重） | +3~4% |
| 云/AI业务（8%权重，增速36%） | +2~3% |
| 即时零售（亏损收窄） | +0.5~1% |
| **加权合计** | **~5.5%** |

永续增长率 = 3.0%（中国长期GDP增速）

---

## 四、DCF估值明细

| 项目 | 金额 ($B) |
|------|-----------|
| Y1-Y5 FCF现值合计 | 82.0 |
| 终值现值 | 191.7 |

| + 净现金 | 9.7 |

|------|-----|-------------------|
| 内在价值 | $156.69 | ¥1,070.06 |
| 当前股价 | $131.88 | ¥900.61 |

## 六、敏感性分析矩阵

内在价值($)/安全边际(%) 随 WACC 与 CAGR 变化：

| WACC \ CAGR | 3.0% | 4.0% | 5.0% | **5.5%** | 6.0% | 7.0% | 8.0% |
|-------------|------|------|------|----------|------|------|------|
| 9.0% | 180/+37% | 187/+42% | 193/+46% | 196/+49% | 200/+51% | 207/+57% | 214/+62% |
| 10.0% | 160/+22% | 165/+25% | 171/+30% | 174/+32% | 177/+34% | 182/+38% | 188/+43% |
| **11.0%** | 145/+10% | 150/+13% | 154/+17% | **157/+19%** | 159/+21% | 164/+24% | 169/+28% |
| 12.0% | 133/+1% | 137/+4% | 141/+7% | 144/+9% | 146/+10% | 150/+14% | 155/+17% |
| 13.0% | 124/-6% | 128/-3% | 131/-1% | 133/+1% | 135/+2% | 139/+5% | 143/+8% |

**关键发现：**
- 🟢 **乐观情景**（WACC 10%, CAGR 6%）：内在价值$177，安全边际+34% → **强烈买入**
- 🟡 **基准情景**（WACC 11%, CAGR 5.5%）：内在价值$157，安全边际+19% → **持有偏买**
- 🔴 **悲观情景**（WACC 13%, CAGR 3%）：内在价值$124，安全边际-6% → **卖出**

当前16.3x P/E处于中国科技板块合理区间下沿，DCF隐含19.4x仍有上行空间。

---

## 八、核心估值逻辑与投资建议

### 🏷️ Final Decision: HOLD（持有，偏向买入）

**核心逻辑：**

1. **估值有支撑但非极度低估**：18.8%安全边际接近但未达到20%价值投资者买入阈值，当前价格处于"合理偏低"而非"显著低估"区间。

2. **AI/云是双刃剑**：云智能集团36%营收增速和AI产品三位数增长是长期催化剂，但1200亿CNY/年的capex短期内严重压制FCF（-71%），投资回报周期不确定。

3. **资产底座提供安全垫**：净现金$9.7B + 非核心投资$84.6B（蚂蚁集团、菜鸟等股权）= $94.3B隐性资产，占总市值30%，提供显著下行保护。

4. **电商基本盘承压但未崩塌**：拼多多/抖音挤压是长期挑战，但即时零售战略（GMV 1万亿CNY目标）为守住用户粘性提供抓手，3年后有望盈利。

5. **催化剂路径**：若FY2026-Q3云业务EBITA率突破12%（当前9%），或即时零售UE扭正进度超预期，安全边际将扩大至25%+，届时升级为**BUY**。

### ⚠️ 关键风险
- 中美地缘政治升级（VIE结构、退市风险）
- AI capex回报不及预期，FCF持续为负
- 即时零售陷入与美团的无底洞补贴战
- 监管政策再次收紧

### 📌 操作建议
- **当前价位**：持有现有仓位，不建议大幅加仓
- **加仓触发**：股价回调至$115以下（安全边际>25%）或云业务EBITA率连续两季>12%
- **减仓触发**：股价上涨至$170以上（安全边际<0%）或FCF连续4季度为负

trajectory.output: {'query': '阿里巴巴 云智能 AI业务 自由现金流 2025 financial news', 'follow_up_questions': None, 'answer': None, 'images': [], 'results': [{'url': 'https://hk.investing.com/news/company-news/article-93CH-1369063', 'title': '阿里巴巴2025財年第三季業績:雲端業務激增36%,但AI投資壓縮利潤', 'content': '表現最突出的是阿里巴巴雲智能集團,其營收同比增長36%至433億人民幣。這標誌著增速較上一季度的29%有所加快,來自外部客戶的收入增長35%。雲端業務的調整後', 'score': 0.85008353, 'raw_content': None}, {'url': 'https://hk.finance.yahoo.com/news/%E9%98%BF%E9%87%8C%E5%B7%B4%E5%B7%B4-ai%E6%94%B6%E5%85%A5%E6%94%80%E5%8D%87%E7%8F%BE%E5%9C%A8%E6%98%AF%E8%B2%B7%E9%80%B2%E7%9A%84%E6%99%82%E6%A9%9F%E5%97%8E-063606376.html', 'title': '阿里巴巴：AI收入攀升現在是買進的時機嗎？', 'content': '# 雅虎香港財經. # 阿里巴巴：AI收入攀升現在是買進的時機嗎？. 阿里巴巴（BABA；9988.HK）在公布2025會計年度第二季（截至9月30日）財報後，股價並未獲得太大動能，儘管公司在電商與雲端雲端運算兩大業務都展現了強勁的營收成長。然而，截至撰寫時，今年以來股價依然上漲約85%。. ## **AI 動能持續增強**. 阿里巴巴的雲端運算業務持續加速成長，主因是人工智能 (AI) 產品需求強勁。雲智能業務營收成長34%至 56億美元，增速高於第一季的26%。AI 產品營收再度翻倍成長。該部門的調整後 EBITA（息稅攤前盈餘）則成長 35%至5.06億美元。. 公司表示，目前需求已超出產能，可能需要提高資本支出預算以因應客戶需求的快速增加。然而，供應限制可能影響公司擴大AI基礎設施支出的速度。. 阿里巴巴最大的業務仍是電商。其兩大核心平台為Tmall（天貓），主要服務品牌商，模式類似Amazon的 marketplace，另一個是Taobao（淘寶），允許品牌與個人賣家進駐。面對中國消費疲弱與競爭加劇，阿里巴巴正積極投資以推動成長。. 這些努力反映在第二季財報中：電商營收成長16%至186億美元。成長由「即時零售」帶動，該業務營收暴增60%至32億美元，目標是在一小時內將商品送到消費者手中。第三方平台業務營收成長 10% 至 111 億美元，直營業務成長 5% 至 34 億美元，批發業務成長13%至9.47億美元。. 然而，對即時零售的投資使該部門 EBITA 大跌76%。公司指出，若排除這些投資，該部門 EBITA 本可達到中個位數成長。. 阿里巴巴計畫在未來幾年持續加大即時零售的投資，即便會犧牲短期獲利，因為公司看到該業務與其他生態系業務之間的規模效應及協同效益。公司目標在三年內，將即時零售GMV（成交總額）推升至1兆人民幣（約 1400 億美元）。. 公司的國際電商業務（AIDC），包括 AliExpress，也度過了不錯的一季，營收成長10%至49億美元。更重要的是，公司兌現了使該部門轉為EBITA獲利的承諾，本季 EBITA 為2300萬美元。. ## **營收提升但獲利承壓**. 整體而言，阿里巴巴本季營收成長5%至348億美元，若排除業務處分影響，則成長達15%。調整後 EBITA 下滑78%至13億美元，調整後每 ADS（美國存託股）盈餘大跌71%至0.61美元。. 營運現金流年減68%至14億美元，而自由現金流則因在即時零售與 AI 基建上的投資而出現31億美元的淨流出。. 阿里巴巴在財年上半年結束時，擁有461億美元現金與短期投資，以及395億美元債務。此外，資產負債表上還有578億美元的股權及其他投資。. ## **成長與高投資期的十字路口**. 現在的阿里巴巴處於有趣的轉折點。過去它是成長放緩但現金充裕、自由現金流強勁的公司；如今營收成長更快，但也因大量投資而造成現金大量消耗、獲利大幅下降。. 如果這些投資最終成功，這並不一定是壞事。但公司正在大幅押注即時零售，其次是雲端運算。好消息是，公司已有透過大量投資換來轉虧為盈的成功案例，例如其 AIDC 國際業務。. ## **估值是否合理？**. 從估值來看，阿里巴巴股價目前的預期本益比（forward P/E）約為2026會計年度預估盈餘的16倍。這比近年高得多，但仍稱不上昂貴。. 作者：Geoffrey Seiler, The Fool. YouTube：hkmoneyclub (https://www.youtube.com/@hkmoneyclub). 本文所提供的信息僅供一般參考之用，並不構成任何個人化的投資勸誘或建議。作者沒持有以上提及的股票。 HK MoneyClub (www.hkmoneyclub.com). ## 推薦新聞.', 'score': 0.79845446, 'raw_content': None}, {'url': 'https://caifuhao.eastmoney.com/news/20260423111536814568790', 'title': '太惨烈，利润雪崩，阿里巴巴的2025年报大暴雷，完全崩掉了_财富号_东方财富网', 'content': '# 太惨烈，利润雪崩，阿里巴巴的2025年报大暴雷，完全崩掉了. 2026年04月23日 11:15  \xa0\xa0 重庆  返回 财富号评论吧>. 腾讯2025年财报出来了，业绩依然稳如，甚至对于leo来说是超预期的，但第二天大跌8% 。阿里的2025年报出来后，资本市场同样大跌6%多，比腾讯的表现强一点，是因为阿里的业绩表现更好吗？. 根据阿里财报，2025年Q4实现营收2848.43亿元，同比增长2%，若剔除高鑫零售和银泰等已处置业务，同口径收入同比增长9%；实现经营利润106.45亿元，同比下降74%；归属于普通股股东的净利润163.22亿元，下降67%；经调整净利润167.1亿元，同样下降67%。经营活动产生的现金流量净额360.32亿元，下降49%；自由现金流113.46亿元，暴跌71%。2025全年实现营收9,963.47 亿元，同比增长 6%；归母净利润为1294.70 亿元。. **不得不说，相比之下，资本市场对阿里还是太过宽容了**，就阿里这业绩，次日的二级市场跌幅竟然比腾讯小。当然了，原因我们也都清楚，阿里在AI上的投入更激进，有未来AI的故事可讲。资本市场对于阿里的宽容，背后其实是对于AI未来的高预期。. 单从现在的赚钱能力看，腾讯和阿里已经是两个不同级别的公司，如果阿里对即时零售和AI的投入不能尽快得到回报，这种差距将会越拉越大，在资本市场的表现长期也会有越来越大的差距，最终成为不同级别的公司，腾讯可能是十万亿级别，而阿里就是万亿级别，那也很公平，资本市场长期还是看赚钱能力。. 具体业务方面，电商业务收入为1315亿元，同比增长1%；外卖业务收入为208亿，同比增长56%，去年同期为133亿，2025年Q3为229亿元，亏损大约260亿元；国际数字业务收入为392亿元，同比增长4%。EBITA为亏损20亿元 ，去年同期亏损40亿；云智能集团收入432亿元，同比增长36%，是此次财报不多的亮点之一，不过EBITA为39亿元，去年同期为31亿元，这个季度EBITA率为9%，和去年差不多，并没有体现出明显的规模效应，当然了，这大概率跟上游内存价格大涨有关系，就目前国内的云服务，成本转移能力还是相对有限。. 不过对于未来的展望，公司还是非常乐观的，定了2028财年即时零售整体交易规模过万亿的目标，在此规模基础上，预计2029财年即时零售业务板块将实现整体盈利。AI和yy业务更是乐观，预计到2031年将实现年化收入超过1000亿美元，以当下云业务约230亿美元年化收入为基数，五年要做到四倍规模，隐含年复合增速约34%。. 市场对于这样的远期目标大部分是嗤之以鼻的，认为是管理层吹牛、说空话。另外，很多人还是认为阿里大举杀入外卖领域并不是一个好选择，Q4的财报也再一次证明了此前市场构筑的外卖和电商业务的协调效应并不靠谱。. 如果纯粹基于财务状况来看，阿里的这份财报显然是不及预期的，上面也说了，现在普遍认知中阿里和腾讯依然属于同一个体量的企业，但实际上论赚钱能力的话，已经完全是两个级别的公司了。即使不考虑现在阿里在外卖和AI上的强投入，也已经是两个级别的，而且本来就一直处于差距逐步拉大的趋势，阿里这两年在外卖和AI上的强投入又加剧了这种差距。. 客观讲，就Q4来看，淘宝闪购业务表现并没有很好，补贴260亿，销售额增长80亿，且环比下跌，而且缩小UE亏损的趋势也并没有继续，说明暂时遇到了增长瓶颈。. 阿里电商的基本盘面临拼多多和抖音电商的双重挤压是不争的事实，想在商品价格上打赢拼多多基本上已经是不可能的事情，阿里高层也基本达成了这种共识，所以淘宝特价版淡出就是标志。另一边，面对字节跳动的竞争，阿里其实也没有很好的办法，没办法，抖音的流量太恐怖了，所以阿里能做的就是在价格不被拼多多拉出太远的情况下，

input.input:
Analyze the sentiment of the following Alibaba AI/Cloud news headlines and provide a sentiment score from -1.0 (very bearish) to +1.0 (very bullish):

1. "AI continued to serve as a growth engine, driving Cloud Intelligence Group revenue up 36%, with AI-related product revenue delivering triple-digit growth for the 9th consecutive quarter"
2. "Alibaba shares rise as AI drives cloud sales jump - CEO Eddie Wu says demand for AI products is accelerating, 120 billion yuan capex on AI/cloud over past 4 quarters"
3. "Alibaba Cloud commits $50 billion to AI development and infrastructure, launches AI catalyst program for startups"
4. "Alibaba.com targets 100% AI adoption by merchants in 2025"
5. "Alibaba Q3 2025: cloud surges 36% as AI investments pressure profits"

import json

# ============================================================
# 阿里巴巴（BABA）深度估值研究 - DCF模型与敏感性分析
# ============================================================

print("=" * 70)
print("  阿里巴巴（BABA）深度估值研究报告")
print("=" * 70)

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 1. 宏观数据汇总
# ----------------------------------------------------------
print("\n【一、宏观数据汇总】")
risk_free_rate = 0.044       # 美国10年期国债收益率 ~4.4%
china_gdp_growth = 0.050     # 中国2025年GDP增速 5.0%
fed_funds_rate = 0.045       # 联邦基金利率 ~4.5%
print(f"  美国10年期国债收益率: {risk_free_rate*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  中国2025年GDP增速:    {china_gdp_growth*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  联邦基金利率:         {fed_funds_rate*100:.1f}%")

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 2. WACC估算
# ----------------------------------------------------------
print("\n【二、WACC估算】")

# Cost of Equity (CAPM + China Risk Premium)
beta = 1.15                  # BABA历史Beta
us_erp = 0.055               # 美国市场风险溢价
china_crp = 0.015            # 中国国家风险溢价（VIE结构、监管、地缘政治）
cost_of_equity = risk_free_rate + beta * us_erp + china_crp
print(f"  无风险利率 (Rf):          {risk_free_rate*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  Beta (β):                 {beta:.2f}")
print(f"  美国市场风险溢价 (ERP):    {us_erp*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  中国国家风险溢价 (CRP):    {china_crp*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  股权成本 (Ke):            {cost_of_equity*100:.2f}%")
print(f"    Ke = {risk_free_rate*100:.1f}% + {beta:.2f}×{us_erp*100:.1f}% + {china_crp*100:.1f}% = {cost_of_equity*100:.2f}%")

# Cost of Debt
pre_tax_cost_of_debt = 0.055  # 阿里巴巴美元债利率
tax_rate = 0.25               # 中国标准企业所得税率
after_tax_cost_of_debt = pre_tax_cost_of_debt * (1 - tax_rate)
print(f"\n  税前债务成本 (Kd):        {pre_tax_cost_of_debt*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  企业所得税率 (T):         {tax_rate*100:.0f}%")
print(f"  税后债务成本:             {after_tax_cost_of_debt*100:.2f}%")

# Capital Structure
# BABA当前股价 $131.88, 流通股 ~2.35B (basic)
stock_price_usd = 131.88
shares_outstanding = 2_348_875_000  # basic shares from FY2025
market_cap_usd = stock_price_usd * shares_outstanding
print(f"\n  市值:                     ${market_cap_usd/1e9:.1f}B")

# 净债务 = 总债务 - 现金
# FY2025: 现金+短期投资 461B CNY, 债务 395B CNY
# 净现金 = 461 - 395 = 66B CNY ≈ $9.2B USD
total_debt_cny = 395e9
cash_cny = 461e9
usd_cny = 6.82898
net_debt_usd = (total_debt_cny - cash_cny) / usd_cny
print(f"  总债务:                   {total_debt_cny/1e9:.0f}B CNY (${total_debt_cny/usd_cny/1e9:.1f}B)")
print(f"  现金及短期投资:           {cash_cny/1e9:.0f}B CNY (${cash_cny/usd_cny/1e9:.1f}B)")
print(f"  净债务:                   ${net_debt_usd/1e9:.1f}B (净现金)")

# 由于净现金为负（净现金头寸），WACC接近Ke
# 但仍按标准公式计算
total_equity = market_cap_usd
total_debt_usd = total_debt_cny / usd_cny
E_ratio = total_equity / (total_equity + total_debt_usd)
D_ratio = total_debt_usd / (total_equity + total_debt_usd)

W$wacc = E_ratio * cost_of_equity + D_ratio * after_tax_cost_of_debt * (1 - tax_rate)  # double counted tax
# Correction: WACC = E/V * Ke + D/V * Kd*(1-T)
wacc = E_ratio * cost_of_equity + D_ratio * after_tax_cost_of_debt

print(f"\n  权重 E/V:                 {E_ratio*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  权重 D/V:                 {D_ratio*100:.1f}%")
print(f"  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
print(f"  WACC:                     {wacc*100:.2f}%")
